shell_command output=Exit code: 0 Wall time: 0.5 seconds Output: 1: # OpenMnemo 记忆树与上下文压缩架构 v1 2: > 日期：2026-03-24 3: > 目标绑定：`goal_v003_20260324.md` 4: > 相关讨论来源： 5: > - `Memory/doubao_20260321101654_...
Show output payload 
Exit code: 0
Wall time: 0.5 seconds
Output:
   1: # OpenMnemo 记忆树与上下文压缩架构 v1
   2: > 日期：2026-03-24
   3: > 目标绑定：`goal_v003_20260324.md`
   4: > 相关讨论来源：
   5: > - `Memory/doubao_20260321101654_https_github_com_openmnemo_o.txt`
   6: > - `Memory/doubao_20260316153420_是这样的_OpenClaw就是O_P_E_N_C_L_A_W.txt`
   7: 
   8: ---
   9: 
  10: ## 1. 核心结论
  11: 
  12: OpenMnemo 的上下文压缩，不应被设计成“把历史内容压成更短摘要”，而应被设计成：
  13: 
  14: **把历史内容组织成可导航、可递进展开、可回填原文的记忆树体系。**
  15: 
  16: 压缩的对象不是“事实本身”，而是：
  17: 
  18: - 进入当前模型上下文的路径
  19: - 进入当前模型上下文的粒度
  20: - 进入当前模型上下文的深度
  21: 
  22: 因此，OpenMnemo 的完整结构不应是一棵单树，而应是三层结构：
  23: 
  24: - `Session Tree`：单一会话的记忆树
  25: - `Repo Tree`：单一仓库的记忆树
  26: - `Global Memory Forest`：所有仓库之上的全局记忆森林
  27: 
  28: 同时配套：
  29: 
  30: - `Probe Pipeline`：探针式递进检索
  31: - `Graph Layer`：跨主题、跨仓库、跨分区的关系连接
  32: - `Budget Profiles`：按不同模型上下文预算动态控制压缩强度
  33: 
  34: ---
  35: 
  36: ## 2. 基本原则
  37: 
  38: ### 2.1 不做有损摘要替代原文
  39: 
  40: - 原始对话必须保留
  41: - 任意压缩节点都只是索引、锚点、里程碑，不是事实源
  42: - 最终回答可在必要时回填原始对话或原始文档
  43: 
  44: ### 2.2 压缩进入上下文的路径
  45: 
  46: - 树节点负责导航
  47: - probe 负责逐层下钻
  48: - graph 负责跨树关联
  49: - vector / FTS 负责召回入口
  50: 
  51: ### 2.3 命中即止
  52: 
  53: - 不为“可能有用”而全量灌入
  54: - 不因模型窗口更大就默认把更多历史塞进去
  55: - 只给当前任务最小必要上下文
  56: 
  57: ### 2.4 Git/Gitea 负责事实、版本、同步
  58: 
  59: - Git/Gitea 是事实层、版本层、隔离层
  60: - 运行时记忆树是逻辑导航结构
  61: - 二者可映射，但不应简单等同
  62: 
  63: ### 2.5 分身是视图，不是物理复制
  64: 
  65: - 每个分身不应复制一整套全局记忆
  66: - 每个分身应拥有自己独立的“记忆树视图”
  67: - 视图由 scope、角色、权限、隐私策略决定
  68: 
  69: ---
  70: 
  71: ## 3. Session Tree：单一会话的记忆树
  72: 
  73: ### 3.1 目标
  74: 
  75: Session Tree 的目标是：
  76: 
  77: - 让超长对话不会线性膨胀
  78: - 让当前模型始终只读会话中的最小必要片段
  79: - 让会话内部的主线、分支、细节都可被追踪
  80: 
  81: ### 3.2 最小层级
  82: 
  83: 建议固定为四层：
  84: 
  85: ```text
  86: SessionRoot
  87: ├── StageNode
  88: │   ├── MilestoneNode
  89: │   │   ├── ArchiveBatch
  90: │   │   │   ├── ConversationLeaf
  91: │   │   │   ├── ConversationLeaf
  92: │   │   │   └── ConversationLeaf
  93: ```
  94: 
  95: ### 3.3 各层职责
  96: 
  97: #### `ConversationLeaf`
  98: 
  99: 最小语义单元，不建议死板绑定“每 3 轮”。
 100: 
 101: 更合理的触发单位：
 102: 
 103: - 1-3 个 user turn
 104: - 一个明确主题片段
 105: - 一次大型工具输出
 106: - 一次明确的结论或转折
 107: 
 108: #### `ArchiveBatch`
 109: 
 110: 小范围收敛节点。
 111: 
 112: 职责：
 113: 
 114: - 聚合若干相近 leaf
 115: - 形成局部锚点
 116: - 保留局部线索与局部主题
 117: 
 118: #### `MilestoneNode`
 119: 
 120: 阶段性里程碑。
 121: 
 122: 建议只记录高价值内容：
 123: 
 124: - 形成了什么结论
 125: - 做了什么决策
 126: - 确立了什么约束
 127: - 暂时未解决什么问题
 128: 
 129: #### `StageNode`
 130: 
 131: 更高层的会话主线节点。
 132: 
 133: 职责：
 134: 
 135: - 标识会话当前阶段
 136: - 串起多个 milestone
 137: - 提供低成本导航入口
 138: 
 139: ### 3.4 Session Tree 的压缩触发
 140: 
 141: 不要只按固定轮次压缩，建议组合四类信号：
 142: 
 143: - `轮次触发`
 144:   - 例如累计 2-4 个 user turn
 145: - `token 触发`
 146:   - 当前活跃上下文接近预算上限
 147: - `主题漂移触发`
 148:   - 文件集、关键词、意图明显变化
 149: - `工具洪峰触发`
 150:   - 出现大段代码、日志、终端输出
 151: 
 152: ### 3.5 Session Tree 的核心字段
 153: 
 154: 建议每个节点至少有：
 155: 
 156: - `id`
 157: - `session_id`
 158: - `node_type`
 159: - `parent_id`
 160: - `child_ids`
 161: - `title`
 162: - `summary`
 163: - `anchor_text`
 164: - `keywords`
 165: - `scope_id`
 166: - `evidence_refs`
 167: - `raw_refs`
 168: - `created_at`
 169: - `updated_at`
 170: - `weight`
 171: 
 172: ### 3.6 Session Tree 的 probe 路径
 173: 
 174: 单会话检索建议固定为：
 175: 
 176: 1. `probe_main(session_id)`
 177: 2. `probe_branch(milestone_id | stage_id)`
 178: 3. `probe_leaf(batch_id | leaf_id)`
 179: 4. `hydrate_raw(raw_ref)`
 180: 
 181: ### 3.7 Session 层停止规则
 182: 
 183: - 主线节点已足够回答，停止
 184: - 分支节点已补足细节，停止
 185: - 叶子节点已提供可验证证据，停止
 186: - 必须核对原文时才回填 raw
 187: 
 188: ---
 189: 
 190: ## 4. Repo Tree：单一仓库的记忆树
 191: 
 192: ### 4.1 目标
 193: 
 194: Repo Tree 的目标不是保存所有会话原文，而是回答：
 195: 
 196: - 这个仓库长期在做什么
 197: - 为什么这么做
 198: - 做到哪了
 199: - 哪些经验已经沉淀成可复用技能
 200: 
 201: ### 4.2 基本结构
 202: 
 203: 建议 Repo Tree 不是简单“会话树拼盘”，而是：
 204: 
 205: ```text
 206: RepoRoot
 207: ├── MainlineStage
 208: │   ├── RepoMilestone
 209: │   ├── RepoMilestone
 210: │   └── RepoMilestone
 211: ├── WorkstreamBranch(memory)
 212: ├── WorkstreamBranch(report-chat)
 213: ├── WorkstreamBranch(gitea)
 214: ├── SkillBranch
 215: └── ProductBranch
 216: ```
 217: 
 218: ### 4.3 Repo Tree 的叶子来源
 219: 
 220: Repo Tree 的叶子不应直接使用原始对话，而应使用：
 221: 
 222: - `session milestone`
 223: - `decision nodes`
 224: - `skill candidates`
 225: - `product artifacts`
 226: 
 227: 也就是：
 228: 
 229: **Session Tree 先压一层，Repo Tree 再吃压过的一层结果。**
 230: 
 231: ### 4.4 Repo Tree 的核心节点类型
 232: 
 233: #### `WorkstreamNode`
 234: 
 235: 表示一条持续工作线。
 236: 
 237: 例如：
 238: 
 239: - memory tree
 240: - report chat
 241: - gitea adapter
 242: - retrieval runtime
 243: 
 244: #### `DecisionNode`
 245: 
 246: 记录仓库关键取舍。
 247: 
 248: 例如：
 249: 
 250: - Git commit 只做事件层，不等于运行时记忆对象
 251: - source_asset 当前是 transcript source，不等于 ProductAsset
 252: 
 253: #### `SkillNode`
 254: 
 255: 记录从仓库实践里沉淀出的可复用能力。
 256: 
 257: 例如：
 258: 
 259: - unit-first retrieval
 260: - mixed recall fusion
 261: - transcript extraction baseline
 262: 
 263: #### `ProductNode`
 264: 
 265: 记录产品性结果。
 266: 
 267: 例如：
 268: 
 269: - API
 270: - 文档
 271: - 报告页功能
 272: - 配置能力
 273: 
 274: ### 4.5 Repo Tree 的输入来源
 275: 
 276: 建议 Repo Tree 主要吃四类输入：
 277: 
 278: - Session Tree milestone
 279: - Git commit context
 280: - ProductAsset 候选对象
 281: - SkillAsset 候选对象
 282: 
 283: ### 4.6 Repo Tree 的 probe 路径
 284: 
 285: 建议单仓库检索时按以下顺序：
 286: 
 287: 1. `probe_repo_main(repo_id)`
 288: 2. `probe_workstream(branch_id)`
 289: 3. `probe_milestone(node_id)`
 290: 4. `probe_session_leaf(node_id)`
 291: 5. `hydrate_raw(ref)`
 292: 
 293: ### 4.7 Repo Tree 典型回答场景
 294: 
 295: Repo Tree 应能稳定回答：
 296: 
 297: - 为什么这个仓库走到今天这条路
 298: - 某条 workstream 曾经踩过哪些坑
 299: - 当前阶段有哪些已定决策
 300: - 哪些实践已经上升为 skill
 301: 
 302: ---
 303: 
 304: ## 5. Global Memory Forest：所有仓库的全局记忆森林
 305: 
 306: ### 5.1 为什么不是“一棵全局树”
 307: 
 308: 所有仓库之上不建议强行做成一棵树，因为：
 309: 
 310: - 一个仓库可能同时属于多个主题
 311: - 一个 skill 会跨多个仓库
 312: - 一个决策可能跨工作、个人、家庭
 313: - 权限隔离与分身授权难以落到单树上
 314: 
 315: 因此，全局层更适合：
 316: 
 317: **森林负责压缩导航，图负责跨域关联。**
 318: 
 319: ### 5.2 建议结构
 320: 
 321: ```text
 322: GlobalForest
 323: ├── ScopeRoot(work)
 324: │   ├── RepoRoot(openmnemo)
 325: │   ├── RepoRoot(client-a)
 326: │   └── RepoRoot(content-studio)
 327: ├── ScopeRoot(personal)
 328: │   ├── RepoRoot(life-os)
 329: │   └── RepoRoot(reading-notes)
 330: ├── ScopeRoot(family)
 331: └── ScopeRoot(shared)
 332: ```
 333: 
 334: ### 5.3 Global 层的核心作用
 335: 
 336: - 做跨仓库导航
 337: - 做跨分区授权视图
 338: - 做长期目标与长期主题聚合
 339: - 为“心跳机制”提供全局复盘入口
 340: 
 341: ### 5.4 Global 层不直接存什么
 342: 
 343: 不建议直接把全量原文和大段细节挂在 Global 层。
 344: 
 345: Global 层只适合保留：
 346: 
 347: - scope 主线
 348: - repo 主线
 349: - 跨仓库 milestones
 350: - 全局 skill
 351: - 全局目标
 352: 
 353: ### 5.5 Global 层与 Graph Layer 的关系
 354: 
 355: Global Forest 不是 Graph 的替代品。
 356: 
 357: 建议分工：
 358: 
 359: - `Forest`
 360:   - 压缩导航
 361:   - 分区隔离
 362:   - 长期主线
 363: 
 364: - `Graph`
 365:   - 跨 scope 关联
 366:   - 跨 repo skill 迁移
 367:   - 跨主题灵感串联
 368: 
 369: ### 5.6 分身在 Global 层的形态
 370: 
 371: “每个分身都有自己独立的记忆树”应解释为：
 372: 
 373: **每个分身拥有自己独立的记忆树视图。**
 374: 
 375: 视图由以下维度裁剪：
 376: 
 377: - `scope`
 378: - `project`
 379: - `persona`
 380: - `privacy_level`
 381: - `allow_cross_scope`
 382: 
 383: 例如：
 384: 
 385: - 工作分身默认只能看 `work`
 386: - 家庭分身默认只能看 `family`
 387: - 战略分身可看 `work + shared`
 388: - 只有显式授权时才允许跨 scope 引入敏感内容
 389: 
 390: ---
 391: 
 392: ## 6. Probe Pipeline：探针式递进检索
 393: 
 394: ### 6.1 总体目标
 395: 
 396: Probe Pipeline 负责控制：
 397: 
 398: - 从哪一层开始找
 399: - 要不要继续往下钻
 400: - 什么时候停止
 401: - 什么时候需要回填原文
 402: 
 403: ### 6.2 推荐执行顺序
 404: 
 405: ```text
 406: Intent Parse
 407: → Scope Select
 408: → Tree Level Select
 409: → probe_main
 410: → probe_branch
 411: → probe_leaf
 412: → hydrate_raw
 413: → answer
 414: ```
 415: 
 416: ### 6.3 停止判断
 417: 
 418: 建议采用“机制优先、模型兜底”的原则。
 419: 
 420: 刚性条件至少包括：
 421: 
 422: - 命中层级
 423: - 信息完整度
 424: - 事实来源是否存在
 425: - 当前预算是否触线
 426: - 是否已覆盖用户问题中的核心实体/时间/项目
 427: 
 428: ### 6.4 兜底入口
 429: 
 430: 当 tree probe 不足以命中时，可开放：
 431: 
 432: - `full_search(query, scope)`
 433: 
 434: 它不直接进回答，而是：
 435: 
 436: 1. 找到候选节点
 437: 2. 再回到 probe 路径逐层展开
 438: 
 439: ---
 440: 
 441: ## 7. Model Budget Profiles：按模型上下文预算做压缩规划
 442: 
 443: ### 7.1 核心原则
 444: 
 445: 不要按模型“标称总窗口”规划，而应按：
 446: 
 447: **有效记忆预算**
 448: 
 449: ```text
 450: 有效记忆预算
 451: = 模型总窗口
 452: - system prompt
 453: - tool schema
 454: - 用户输入
 455: - 预留输出空间
 456: ```
 457: 
 458: ### 7.2 五档预算模型
 459: 
 460: #### `S` 档：极小预算
 461: 
 462: 只给：
 463: 
 464: - 当前轮
 465: - Session 主线节点
 466: - 1 个 Repo milestone
 467: - 1 个小 raw snippet
 468: 
 469: 特点：
 470: 
 471: - 不进 Global 层
 472: - 最多 probe 到 branch
 473: 
 474: #### `M` 档：小预算
 475: 
 476: 只给：
 477: 
 478: - 当前轮
 479: - Session 主线
 480: - 1-2 个 branch
 481: - 1 个 Repo milestone
 482: - 1 个 Skill 节点
 483: 
 484: 特点：
 485: 
 486: - raw 只给片段
 487: - 最多 probe 到 leaf
 488: 
 489: #### `L` 档：中预算
 490: 
 491: 可给：
 492: 
 493: - Session 主线
 494: - Repo 当前 workstream
 495: - 相关 skill
 496: - 少量 Global anchor
 497: - 2-4 个 raw snippets
 498: 
 499: 特点：
 500: 
 501: - 可做一次 cross-branch 关联
 502: 
 503: #### `XL` 档：大预算
 504: 
 505: 可给：
 506: 
 507: - Session Tree 主线 + 多 branch
 508: - Repo Tree 当前阶段
 509: - Global scope 中相关主线
 510: - 多个 raw evidence
 511: 
 512: 特点：
 513: 
 514: - 适合复杂规划、复杂代码任务
 515: 
 516: #### `XXL` 档：超大预算
 517: 
 518: 原则仍然不是全量灌入。
 519: 
 520: 特点：
 521: 
 522: - 只是提高 raw evidence 比例
 523: - 适合长审查、长复盘、长规划
 524: 
 525: ### 7.3 任务模板
 526: 
 527: 同一预算档下，也应按任务类型调配比例。
 528: 
 529: #### `问答模板`
 530: 
 531: - Session 70%
 532: - Repo 20%
 533: - Global 10%
 534: 
 535: #### `代码开发模板`
 536: 
 537: - Repo 50%
 538: - Session 30%
 539: - Skill 20%
 540: 
 541: #### `复盘模板`
 542: 
 543: - Repo 40%
 544: - Global 30%
 545: - Session 30%
 546: 
 547: #### `跨仓库灵感模板`
 548: 
 549: - Global 40%
 550: - Repo 35%
 551: - Session 25%
 552: 
 553: ---
 554: 
 555: ## 8. 与当前 OpenMnemo 实现的映射建议
 556: 
 557: ### 8.1 当前对象如何承接
 558: 
 559: 现阶段可先这样映射：
 560: 
 561: - `memory_unit`
 562:   - 更接近 Session Tree 的 leaf 层素材
 563: 
 564: - `archive_anchor`
 565:   - 更接近 Session Tree / Repo Tree 的锚点层素材
 566: 
 567: - `source_asset`
 568:   - 更接近来源/证据层对象
 569: 
 570: - `session`
 571:   - 更接近当前的会话级容器对象
 572: 
 573: ### 8.2 短期不要做的事
 574: 
 575: - 不要立刻用新树模型替换现有 `DataLayerAPI`
 576: - 不要把 Git commit 树直接当运行时树
 577: - 不要把所有仓库强行塞成一棵树
 578: - 不要为每个分身物理复制全量记忆
 579: 
 580: ### 8.3 短期建议路线
 581: 
 582: #### Phase A
 583: 
 584: - 先把 Session Tree 落成正式数据结构
 585: - 让 `memory_unit + archive_anchor` 能映射到 `leaf / batch / milestone`
 586: 
 587: #### Phase B
 588: 
 589: - 在 Repo 级别引入 workstream / repo milestone
 590: - 让 repo 查询不再只靠 session 聚合
 591: 
 592: #### Phase C
 593: 
 594: - 引入 Global Forest 视图层
 595: - 再叠加 Graph 的跨仓库关系
 596: 
 597: #### Phase D
 598: 
 599: - 做 model budget profiles
 600: - 让不同模型与不同任务模板共享同一 probe pipeline
 601: 
 602: ---
 603: 
 604: ## 9. 一句话总结
 605: 
 606: OpenMnemo 的记忆压缩架构，不应是“把越来越多的历史缩成越来越短的摘要”，而应是：
 607: 
 608: **Session Tree 管单会话，Repo Tree 管单仓库，Global Memory Forest 管所有仓库；Probe Pipeline 管递进展开，Graph 管跨域关联，Git/Gitea 管事实与版本，Budget Profiles 管不同模型下的上下文压缩强度。**
Tool Result #584 shell_command call_t3Vlm5AfqSlusfCYFgYowUTc exit 0 06:06:58
shell_command output=Exit code: 0 Wall time: 0.5 seconds Output: 1: # 创造资产内核对象模型 2: > 日期：2026-03-24 3: > 目标绑定：`goal_v003_20260324.md` 4: 5: --- 6: 7: ## 1. 核心判断 8: 9: OpenMnemo 未来的开源核心，不应只被定义为“记忆底座”...
Show output payload 
Exit code: 0
Wall time: 0.5 seconds
Output:
   1: # 创造资产内核对象模型
   2: > 日期：2026-03-24
   3: > 目标绑定：`goal_v003_20260324.md`
   4: 
   5: ---
   6: 
   7: ## 1. 核心判断
   8: 
   9: OpenMnemo 未来的开源核心，不应只被定义为“记忆底座”，而应被定义为：
  10: 
  11: **创造资产内核**
  12: 
  13: 它要统一沉淀三类资产：
  14: 
  15: - `创作结果` -> `ProductAsset`
  16: - `创作过程` -> `MemoryAsset`
  17: - `创作能力` -> `SkillAsset`
  18: 
  19: 这三类资产不是三套孤立系统，而是同一套 Git-native 资产体系中的三种对象类型。
  20: 
  21: ---
  22: 
  23: ## 2. 共享基类：BaseAsset
  24: 
  25: 三类资产都应共享一套最小公共字段。
  26: 
  27: ### 2.1 建议字段
  28: 
  29: - `id`
  30: - `asset_type`
  31: - `project_id`
  32: - `scope_id`
  33: - `title`
  34: - `summary`
  35: - `status`
  36: - `tags`
  37: - `source_refs`
  38: - `session_refs`
  39: - `commit_refs`
  40: - `created_at`
  41: - `updated_at`
  42: - `privacy_level`
  43: - `version`
  44: - `lineage`
  45: 
  46: ### 2.2 设计含义
  47: 
  48: - `source_refs`：回指原始对话、原始文件、原始文档、原始工作流结果
  49: - `session_refs`：回指形成该资产的对话会话
  50: - `commit_refs`：回指代码或文档变更事实
  51: - `lineage`：记录该资产由什么资产演化而来
  52: 
  53: ---
  54: 
  55: ## 3. ProductAsset
  56: 
  57: `ProductAsset` 对应创作结果。
  58: 
  59: 它不只代表“代码文件”，而是泛指自然语言创作最终落地的产品性产物。
  60: 
  61: ### 3.1 可包含的对象
  62: 
  63: - 文件
  64: - 模块
  65: - API
  66: - 文档
  67: - 配置
  68: - 数据集
  69: - 发布物
  70: - workflow 运行产物
  71: 
  72: ### 3.2 建议字段
  73: 
  74: - `product_kind`
  75: - `repo_uri`
  76: - `repo_path`
  77: - `branch`
  78: - `commit_range`
  79: - `artifact_format`
  80: - `owner_module`
  81: - `build_state`
  82: - `related_memory_ids`
  83: - `related_skill_ids`
  84: 
  85: ### 3.3 它解决的问题
  86: 
  87: - 一个项目最终产出了什么
  88: - 这些产物位于仓库的什么位置
  89: - 这些产物与哪些对话、决策、技能相关
  90: 
  91: ---
  92: 
  93: ## 4. MemoryAsset
  94: 
  95: `MemoryAsset` 对应创作过程。
  96: 
  97: 它是这次规划的核心，因为“记忆树 + 探针检索”主要服务于它。
  98: 
  99: ### 4.1 可包含的对象
 100: 
 101: - 问题
 102: - 决策
 103: - 约束
 104: - 偏好
 105: - 尝试
 106: - 失败
 107: - 洞见
 108: - 里程碑
 109: - 原始问题演化链
 110: 
 111: ### 4.2 建议字段
 112: 
 113: - `memory_kind`
 114: - `tree_level`
 115: - `anchor_text`
 116: - `raw_refs`
 117: - `parent_id`
 118: - `child_ids`
 119: - `branch_key`
 120: - `evidence_refs`
 121: - `related_product_ids`
 122: - `related_skill_ids`
 123: - `probe_policy`
 124: 
 125: ### 4.3 核心原则
 126: 
 127: - 不是删除原文，而是压缩进入上下文的路径
 128: - 原始内容必须保留
 129: - 树上节点用于导航、压缩、定位、回填
 130: - 召回采用“命中即止”的渐进展开
 131: 
 132: ---
 133: 
 134: ## 5. SkillAsset
 135: 
 136: `SkillAsset` 对应创作能力。
 137: 
 138: 它不是“对话里某句建议”，而是经过复盘后，能重复调用的稳定能力对象。
 139: 
 140: ### 5.1 可包含的对象
 141: 
 142: - 方法论
 143: - checklist
 144: - prompt 模板
 145: - workflow 模板
 146: - 解决模式
 147: - 反模式
 148: - 调试套路
 149: - 评审套路
 150: 
 151: ### 5.2 建议字段
 152: 
 153: - `skill_kind`
 154: - `trigger_conditions`
 155: - `prerequisites`
 156: - `steps`
 157: - `inputs`
 158: - `outputs`
 159: - `success_signals`
 160: - `anti_patterns`
 161: - `evidence_refs`
 162: - `derived_from_memory_ids`
 163: - `applies_to_product_ids`
 164: - `confidence`
 165: 
 166: ### 5.3 它解决的问题
 167: 
 168: - 这次创作最后沉淀出了什么能力
 169: - 这些能力是从哪些对话和结果里提炼出来的
 170: - 下一次遇到类似问题，如何直接复用
 171: 
 172: ---
 173: 
 174: ## 6. 三类资产之间的关系
 175: 
 176: 建议至少支持以下关系：
 177: 
 178: - `MemoryAsset -> ProductAsset`
 179:   - `LEADS_TO`
 180:   - 表示某段过程最终导向了某个产物
 181: 
 182: - `SkillAsset -> ProductAsset`
 183:   - `APPLIES_TO`
 184:   - 表示某个技能可用于某类产物
 185: 
 186: - `SkillAsset -> MemoryAsset`
 187:   - `EXTRACTED_FROM`
 188:   - 表示技能是从某段过程提炼出来的
 189: 
 190: - `MemoryAsset -> MemoryAsset`
 191:   - `EVOLVES_TO`
 192:   - 表示问题、决策、思路的演化
 193: 
 194: - `ProductAsset -> ProductAsset`
 195:   - `DEPENDS_ON`
 196:   - 表示模块、文件、发布物之间的依赖关系
 197: 
 198: ---
 199: 
 200: ## 7. 记忆树最小结构
 201: 
 202: 建议将 `MemoryAsset` 的树形结构明确为四层：
 203: 
 204: - `ConversationLeaf`
 205:   - 最小对话叶子
 206:   - 对应 1-3 轮或一个最小主题片段
 207: 
 208: - `ArchiveBatch`
 209:   - 一组叶子节点的阶段性归档
 210: 
 211: - `MilestoneNode`
 212:   - 一个阶段的核心里程碑
 213: 
 214: - `StageNode`
 215:   - 更高层的阶段主线节点
 216: 
 217: ### 7.1 作用分工
 218: 
 219: - `Leaf`：保留局部具体语境
 220: - `Batch`：做小范围收敛
 221: - `Milestone`：形成阶段主线
 222: - `Stage`：形成长期导航主干
 223: 
 224: ---
 225: 
 226: ## 8. 探针式检索最小接口
 227: 
 228: 建议最小接口为：
 229: 
 230: - `probe_main(query, scope)`
 231:   - 先拿主干节点
 232: 
 233: - `probe_branch(node_id)`
 234:   - 展开某个里程碑下的分支
 235: 
 236: - `probe_leaf(node_id)`
 237:   - 查看具体叶子或小归档
 238: 
 239: - `hydrate_raw(ref)`
 240:   - 必要时回填原始对话或原始文档
 241: 
 242: ### 8.1 检索原则
 243: 
 244: - 先主线，后分支，再叶子，最后原文
 245: - 命中即停
 246: - 不为“可能有用”而全量灌入
 247: - 让上下文负载稳定，不随历史轮数线性膨胀
 248: 
 249: ---
 250: 
 251: ## 9. 与当前代码现实的映射
 252: 
 253: 当前已有对象可以看作未来三类资产模型的前身，而不是错误方向。
 254: 
 255: ### 9.1 现状映射
 256: 
 257: - `memory_unit`
 258:   - 更接近 `MemoryAsset` 的叶子层或结构化记忆单元
 259: 
 260: - `source_asset`
 261:   - 更接近来源/证据层的原始载体对象
 262:   - 当前主要是 transcript source，不等同于未来 `ProductAsset`
 263: 
 264: - `archive_anchor`
 265:   - 更接近 `MemoryAsset` 中的锚点/里程碑节点
 266: 
 267: ### 9.2 这意味着
 268: 
 269: 当前代码基础可以继续沿用，但后续命名、关系、接口应逐步从“记忆对象”升级为“创造资产对象”。
 270: 
 271: ### 9.3 ProductAsset 的当前缺口
 272: 
 273: - 当前代码中还没有与 `ProductAsset` 一一对应的一等运行时对象
 274: - 未来 `ProductAsset` 更适合来自 repo/file/doc/workflow artifact 的独立导入与聚合
 275: - 不应直接把当前 transcript `source_asset` 误当成 `ProductAsset`
 276: 
 277: ### 9.4 与当前 DataLayerAPI 的兼容桥
 278: 
 279: 三类资产模型在短期内不应直接替换当前 `RetrievalReference kind`。
 280: 
 281: - `MemoryAsset`
 282:   - 短期先投影到 `memory_unit + archive_anchor + session context`
 283: 
 284: - `source_asset`
 285:   - 继续作为来源/证据对象存在
 286: 
 287: - `ProductAsset`
 288:   - 短期先通过 repo path / commit context / 文档导入等聚合视图表达
 289: 
 290: - `SkillAsset`
 291:   - 短期先作为从 `MemoryAsset` 派生出来的稳定对象
 292: 
 293: - 当前 `DataLayerAPI`
 294:   - 继续暴露 `session / memory_unit / source_asset / archive_anchor / mixed`
 295: 
 296: - 后续资产级接口
 297:   - 应优先作为 `DataLayerAPI` 之上的投影层或单独的 `AssetLayerAPI`
 298:   - 不应在没有映射关系的前提下平行创造第二套运行时 kind
 299: 
 300: ---
 301: 
 302: ## 10. 对开源核心边界的启发
 303: 
 304: 从该对象模型出发，开源核心应该至少包含：
 305: 
 306: - 三类资产对象模型
 307: - 统一导入与提炼
 308: - Git/Gitea 回写
 309: - 记忆树生成与探针检索
 310: - FTS / vector / graph / probe 检索层
 311: - 面向上层产品的最小运行时接口
 312: 
 313: 而不应急于直接吸收：
 314: 
 315: - 完整 deer-flow 式 super agent harness
 316: - 重型工作台 UI
 317: - 商业化协作系统
 318: - 市场、计费、SaaS 托管层
 319: 
 320: ---
 321: 
 322: ## 11. 一句话总结
 323: 
 324: OpenMnemo 的下一阶段，不是单纯把“记忆做得更强”，而是要把：
 325: 
 326: **创作结果、创作过程、创作能力**
 327: 
 328: 统一变成可拥有、可检索、可复用、可演化的 Git-native 长期资产。

      "developer_instructions": "# Collaboration Mode: Default\r\n\r\nYou are now in Default mode. Any previous instructions for other modes (e.g. Plan mode) are no longer active.\r\n\r\nYour active mode changes only when new developer instructions with a different `<collaboration_mode>...</collaboration_mode>` change it; user requests or tool descriptions do not change mode by themselves. Known mode names are Default and Plan.\r\n\r\n## request_user_input availability\r\n\r\nThe `request_user_input` tool is unavailable in Default mode. If you call it while in Default mode, it will return an error.\r\n\r\nIn Default mode, strongly prefer making reasonable assumptions and executing the user's request rather than stopping to ask questions. If you absolutely must ask a question because the answer cannot be discovered from local context and a reasonable assumption would be risky, ask the user directly with a concise plain-text question. Never write a multiple choice question as a textual assistant message.\r\n"
    }
  },
  "realtime_active": false,
  "effort": "xhigh",
  "summary": "none",
  "user_instructions": "# AGENTS.md\n\n## Read Order\n- Read this file first.\n- Read the latest file in `Memory/01_goals/`.\n- Read the latest todo bound to that goal in `Memory/02_todos/`.\n- Read `Memory/04_knowledge/` only when needed.\n- Read `Memory/06_transcripts/clean/` and transcript manifests only when needed.\n- Read `Memory/03_chat_logs/` and `Memory/05_archive/` only when needed.\n\n## Memory Rules\n- Change the active goal only after explicit user confirmation of a requirement or scope change.\n- Keep the active todo synchronized with the active goal.\n- Append chat logs only. Never rewrite or delete prior entries.\n- Keep active files concise and move stale context to knowledge or archive files.\n- Treat cleaned transcript indexes as search aids. Confirm exact wording against the raw transcript archive when precision matters.\n\n## Transcript Rules\n- If transcript archival is enabled, archive transcripts by client, project, and session.\n- Keep raw transcripts in both this repository's `Memory/06_transcripts/raw/` mirror and the user-level MemoryTree archive.\n- Keep this repository mirror limited to transcripts that belong to the current project. Archive unrelated projects in the global MemoryTree archive only.\n- Generate cleaned transcript indexes with deterministic code, not model-generated rewriting.\n- Raw transcript upload permission for this repository: not set. Ask the user before the first raw transcript commit or push, then record the answer here.\n- If raw transcript uploads are not approved, keep `Memory/06_transcripts/raw/**` unstaged and commit only cleaned transcript indexes or manifests for this repository.\n\n## Git Rules\n- Obey this repository's branch, PR, CI, review, and release rules.\n- Auto-commit and push only MemoryTree-owned changes (`Memory/**` and this file when it is managed by MemoryTree), excluding `Memory/06_transcripts/raw/**` until raw transcript uploads are approved for this repository.\n- Use a MemoryTree-scoped commit title. Prefer `memorytree(<scope>): <subject>`, or the repository-required equivalent such as `docs(memorytree): <subject>`.\n- Use a dedicated branch and PR for MemoryTree-only changes. Enable auto-merge only when repository rules permit it.\n- If a diff includes product code, shared policy files, cross-project transcript files, or unclear ownership, stop and ask the user before staging or pushing.\n- When `auto_push` is enabled, the heartbeat process pushes automatically after committing. If no remote is configured or a push fails, an alert is written to `~/.memorytree/alerts.json`.\n\n## Heartbeat Rules\n- Transcript discovery, import, cleaning, and push are handled by the background heartbeat process. The model does not execute these operations.\n- The model only writes chat log summaries and updates goals and todos during interactive sessions.\n- If `~/.memorytree/alerts.json` contains pending notifications, display them at the start of the session.\n- If `memorytree-daemon` is available but not registered on this machine, ask the user for their preferred settings and offer to run `memorytree-daemon install`.\n- When the user asks to see their most recent conversation, trigger an on-demand sync for the current project, locate the latest session across all clients (Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI), and generate a continuation summary.\n- All interactive prompts must use plain-text questions. Do not rely on client-specific UI components.\n",
  "truncation_policy": {
    "mode": "tokens",
    "limit": 10000
  }
}

 221: ### 9.2 杩欐剰鍛崇潃
 222:

347:- scope 主线
348:- repo 主线
365:  - 跨 scope 关联
366:  - 跨 repo skill 迁移
377:- `scope`
381:- `allow_cross_scope`
385:- 工作分身默认只能看 `work`
386:- 家庭分身默认只能看 `family`
387:- 战略分身可看 `work + shared`
388:- 只有显式授权时才允许跨 scope 引入敏感内容
432:- `full_search(query, scope)`
494:- Repo 当前 workstream
509:- Global scope 中相关主线
589:- 在 Repo 级别引入 workstream / repo milestone
590:- 让 repo 查询不再只靠 session 聚合
608:**Session Tree 管单会话，Repo Tree 管单仓库，Global Memory Forest 管所有仓库；Probe Pipeline 管递进展开，Graph 管跨域关联，Git/Gitea 管事实与版本，Budget Profiles 管不同模型下的上下文压缩强度。**

 369: ### 5.6 分身在 Global 层的形态
 370: 
 371: “每个分身都有自己独立的记忆树”应解释为：
 372: 
 373: **每个分身拥有自己独立的记忆树视图。**
 374: 
 375: 视图由以下维度裁剪：
 376: 
 377: - `scope`
 378: - `project`
 379: - `persona`
 380: - `privacy_level`
 381: - `allow_cross_scope`
 382: 
 383: 例如：
 384: 
 385: - 工作分身默认只能看 `work`
 386: - 家庭分身默认只能看 `family`
 387: - 战略分身可看 `work + shared`
 388: - 只有显式授权时才允许跨 scope 引入敏感内容

 604: ## 9. 一句话总结
 605: 
 606: OpenMnemo 的记忆压缩架构，不应是“把越来越多的历史缩成越来越短的摘要”，而应是：
 607: 
 608: **Session Tree 管单会话，Repo Tree 管单仓库，Global Memory Forest 管所有仓库；Probe Pipeline 管递进展开，Graph 管跨域关联，Git/Gitea 管事实与版本，Budget Profiles 管不同模型下的上下文压缩强度。**

assistant #659 final_answer 06:11:43

**Findings** 1. `Medium` 探针接口已经分叉成了三套语义，不再是同一层抽象。Session Tree 写的是 `probe_main(session_id)`，Repo Tree 又变成 `probe_repo_main(repo_id)`，资产模型文档则写成 `probe_main(query, scope)`。这不是小的命名差异，而是把“按对象导航”和“按查询检索”混到了一起；如果现在不统一，后面实现 r...

Expand full message

Findings

1. Medium 探针接口已经分叉成了三套语义，不再是同一层抽象。Session Tree 写的是 probe_main(session_id)，Repo Tree 又变成 probe_repo_main(repo_id)，资产模型文档则写成 probe_main(query, scope)。这不是小的命名差异，而是把“按对象导航”和“按查询检索”混到了一起；如果现在不统一，后面实现 runtime、tool schema、LLM 调用路由时一定会漂。参考：[OpenMnemo_记忆树与上下文压缩架构_v1_2026-03-24.md:176](d:/demo1/openmnemo/Memory/04_knowledge/OpenMnemo_记忆树与上下文压缩架构_v1_2026-03-24.md#L176) [OpenMnemo_记忆树与上下文压缩架构_v1_2026-03-24.md:287](d:/demo1/openmnemo/Memory/04_knowledge/OpenMnemo_记忆树与上下文压缩架构_v1_2026-03-24.md#L287) [创造资产内核对象模型_2026-03-24.md:230](d:/demo1/openmnemo/Memory/04_knowledge/创造资产内核对象模型_2026-03-24.md#L230)

2. Medium Global Memory Forest 还没有彻底讲清“物理节点”和“scope 视图”的关系。示例里是严格的 ScopeRoot -> RepoRoot 单归属结构，但后文又明确说分身拿到的是按 scope / persona / privacy 裁剪后的“记忆树视图”，而跨 scope 关联交给 Graph。如果按现在的例子直接实现，后面做 shared、跨 scope 授权、跨仓 skill 迁移时，很容易出现 repo 重复挂载或权限判断失真。参考：[OpenMnemo_记忆树与上下文压缩架构_v1_2026-03-24.md:323](d:/demo1/openmnemo/Memory/04_knowledge/OpenMnemo_记忆树与上下文压缩架构_v1_2026-03-24.md#L323) [OpenMnemo_记忆树与上下文压缩架构_v1_2026-03-24.md:355](d:/demo1/openmnemo/Memory/04_knowledge/OpenMnemo_记忆树与上下文压缩架构_v1_2026-03-24.md#L355) [OpenMnemo_记忆树与上下文压缩架构_v1_2026-03-24.md:371](d:/demo1/openmnemo/Memory/04_knowledge/OpenMnemo_记忆树与上下文压缩架构_v1_2026-03-24.md#L371)

3. Medium todo 状态已经落后于设计现状。todo_v003 还把“形成 Session Tree / Repo Tree / Global Memory Forest / Budget Profiles 的统一设计稿”标成未完成，但统一设计稿其实已经单独成文。这个会直接影响下一轮执行，因为别人会误以为概念设计还没收口。参考：[todo_v003_001_20260324.md:17](d:/demo1/openmnemo/Memory/02_todos/todo_v003_001_20260324.md#L17) [OpenMnemo_记忆树与上下文压缩架构_v1_2026-03-24.md:608](d:/demo1/openmnemo/Memory/04_knowledge/OpenMnemo_记忆树与上下文压缩架构_v1_2026-03-24.md#L608)

4. Low/Medium Session Tree 的压缩触发条件仍然偏“代码会话”，对纯对话记忆场景不够稳。现在“主题漂移触发”写的是“文件集、关键词、意图明显变化”，但你们要覆盖的是创作交流、人生记忆、技能沉淀，这类会话可能根本没有稳定文件集。这样一来，非代码对话的分叉和压缩时机就会不稳定。参考：[OpenMnemo_记忆树与上下文压缩架构_v1_2026-03-24.md:147](d:/demo1/openmnemo/Memory/04_knowledge/OpenMnemo_记忆树与上下文压缩架构_v1_2026-03-24.md#L147)

两轮 review 下来，当前能明确算“文档级 bug”的有 4 个，没有发现方向性推翻的问题，但第 1 和第 2 个要优先修，不然一进入实现阶段就会开始分叉。第 3 和第 4 个属于执行层和适配层 bug，也建议尽快收口。

如果你愿意，我下一步可以直接把这 4 个点改进成一版 v2 规划文档，只收口术语、接口和树模型，不动产品代码。

task_completed #661 019d1e73-9eeb-7840-8630-7653e0df4bde 06:11:43
**Findings** 1. `Medium` 探针接口已经分叉成了三套语义，不再是同一层抽象。Session Tree 写的是 `probe_main(session_id)`，Repo Tree 又变成 `probe_repo_main(repo_id)`，资产模型文档则写成 `probe_main(query, scope)`。这不是小的命名差异，而是把“按对象导航”和“按查询检索”混到了一起；如果现在不统一，后面实现 runtime、tool schema、L...
Show task summary

Findings

1. Medium 探针接口已经分叉成了三套语义，不再是同一层抽象。Session Tree 写的是 probe_main(session_id)，Repo Tree 又变成 probe_repo_main(repo_id)，资产模型文档则写成 probe_main(query, scope)。这不是小的命名差异，而是把“按对象导航”和“按查询检索”混到了一起；如果现在不统一，后面实现 runtime、tool schema、LLM 调用路由时一定会漂。参考：[OpenMnemo_记忆树与上下文压缩架构_v1_2026-03-24.md:176](d:/demo1/openmnemo/Memory/04_knowledge/OpenMnemo_记忆树与上下文压缩架构_v1_2026-03-24.md#L176) [OpenMnemo_记忆树与上下文压缩架构_v1_2026-03-24.md:287](d:/demo1/openmnemo/Memory/04_knowledge/OpenMnemo_记忆树与上下文压缩架构_v1_2026-03-24.md#L287) [创造资产内核对象模型_2026-03-24.md:230](d:/demo1/openmnemo/Memory/04_knowledge/创造资产内核对象模型_2026-03-24.md#L230)

2. Medium Global Memory Forest 还没有彻底讲清“物理节点”和“scope 视图”的关系。示例里是严格的 ScopeRoot -> RepoRoot 单归属结构，但后文又明确说分身拿到的是按 scope / persona / privacy 裁剪后的“记忆树视图”，而跨 scope 关联交给 Graph。如果按现在的例子直接实现，后面做 shared、跨 scope 授权、跨仓 skill 迁移时，很容易出现 repo 重复挂载或权限判断失真。参考：[OpenMnemo_记忆树与上下文压缩架构_v1_2026-03-24.md:323](d:/demo1/openmnemo/Memory/04_knowledge/OpenMnemo_记忆树与上下文压缩架构_v1_2026-03-24.md#L323) [OpenMnemo_记忆树与上下文压缩架构_v1_2026-03-24.md:355](d:/demo1/openmnemo/Memory/04_knowledge/OpenMnemo_记忆树与上下文压缩架构_v1_2026-03-24.md#L355) [OpenMnemo_记忆树与上下文压缩架构_v1_2026-03-24.md:371](d:/demo1/openmnemo/Memory/04_knowledge/OpenMnemo_记忆树与上下文压缩架构_v1_2026-03-24.md#L371)

3. Medium todo 状态已经落后于设计现状。todo_v003 还把“形成 Session Tree / Repo Tree / Global Memory Forest / Budget Profiles 的统一设计稿”标成未完成，但统一设计稿其实已经单独成文。这个会直接影响下一轮执行，因为别人会误以为概念设计还没收口。参考：[todo_v003_001_20260324.md:17](d:/demo1/openmnemo/Memory/02_todos/todo_v003_001_20260324.md#L17) [OpenMnemo_记忆树与上下文压缩架构_v1_2026-03-24.md:608](d:/demo1/openmnemo/Memory/04_knowledge/OpenMnemo_记忆树与上下文压缩架构_v1_2026-03-24.md#L608)

4. Low/Medium Session Tree 的压缩触发条件仍然偏“代码会话”，对纯对话记忆场景不够稳。现在“主题漂移触发”写的是“文件集、关键词、意图明显变化”，但你们要覆盖的是创作交流、人生记忆、技能沉淀，这类会话可能根本没有稳定文件集。这样一来，非代码对话的分叉和压缩时机就会不稳定。参考：[OpenMnemo_记忆树与上下文压缩架构_v1_2026-03-24.md:147](d:/demo1/openmnemo/Memory/04_knowledge/OpenMnemo_记忆树与上下文压缩架构_v1_2026-03-24.md#L147)

两轮 review 下来，当前能明确算“文档级 bug”的有 4 个，没有发现方向性推翻的问题，但第 1 和第 2 个要优先修，不然一进入实现阶段就会开始分叉。第 3 和第 4 个属于执行层和适配层 bug，也建议尽快收口。

如果你愿意，我下一步可以直接把这 4 个点改进成一版 v2 规划文档，只收口术语、接口和树模型，不动产品代码。

  "user_instructions": "# AGENTS.md\n\n## Read Order\n- Read this file first.\n- Read the latest file in `Memory/01_goals/`.\n- Read the latest todo bound to that goal in `Memory/02_todos/`.\n- Read `Memory/04_knowledge/` only when needed.\n- Read `Memory/06_transcripts/clean/` and transcript manifests only when needed.\n- Read `Memory/03_chat_logs/` and `Memory/05_archive/` only when needed.\n\n## Memory Rules\n- Change the active goal only after explicit user confirmation of a requirement or scope change.\n- Keep the active todo synchronized with the active goal.\n- Append chat logs only. Never rewrite or delete prior entries.\n- Keep active files concise and move stale context to knowledge or archive files.\n- Treat cleaned transcript indexes as search aids. Confirm exact wording against the raw transcript archive when precision matters.\n\n## Transcript Rules\n- If transcript archival is enabled, archive transcripts by client, project, and session.\n- Keep raw transcripts in both this repository's `Memory/06_transcripts/raw/` mirror and the user-level MemoryTree archive.\n- Keep this repository mirror limited to transcripts that belong to the current project. Archive unrelated projects in the global MemoryTree archive only.\n- Generate cleaned transcript indexes with deterministic code, not model-generated rewriting.\n- Raw transcript upload permission for this repository: not set. Ask the user before the first raw transcript commit or push, then record the answer here.\n- If raw transcript uploads are not approved, keep `Memory/06_transcripts/raw/**` unstaged and commit only cleaned transcript indexes or manifests for this repository.\n\n## Git Rules\n- Obey this repository's branch, PR, CI, review, and release rules.\n- Auto-commit and push only MemoryTree-owned changes (`Memory/**` and this file when it is managed by MemoryTree), excluding `Memory/06_transcripts/raw/**` until raw transcript uploads are approved for this repository.\n- Use a MemoryTree-scoped commit title. Prefer `memorytree(<scope>): <subject>`, or the repository-required equivalent such as `docs(memorytree): <subject>`.\n- Use a dedicated branch and PR for MemoryTree-only changes. Enable auto-merge only when repository rules permit it.\n- If a diff includes product code, shared policy files, cross-project transcript files, or unclear ownership, stop and ask the user before staging or pushing.\n- When `auto_push` is enabled, the heartbeat process pushes automatically after committing. If no remote is configured or a push fails, an alert is written to `~/.memorytree/alerts.json`.\n\n## Heartbeat Rules\n- Transcript discovery, import, cleaning, and push are handled by the background heartbeat process. The model does not execute these operations.\n- The model only writes chat log summaries and updates goals and todos during interactive sessions.\n- If `~/.memorytree/alerts.json` contains pending notifications, display them at the start of the session.\n- If `memorytree-daemon` is available but not registered on this machine, ask the user for their preferred settings and offer to run `memorytree-daemon install`.\n- When the user asks to see their most recent conversation, trigger an on-demand sync for the current project, locate the latest session across all clients (Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI), and generate a continuation summary.\n- All interactive prompts must use plain-text questions. Do not rely on client-specific UI components.\n",

    "mode": "tokens",
    "limit": 10000
  }
}

Output:
---
name: memorytree-workflow
description: Detect, initialize, and maintain a reusable MemoryTree project-memory workspace for any code repository. On activation, immediately detect and report the repo's MemoryTree state.
---

# MemoryTree

Use this skill for repo-level project memory. Do not treat it as an application runtime feature unless the user explicitly asks to productize it.

## On Activation

When this skill is invoked, immediately perform these steps without waiting for further user input:

1. Detect the repo state (`not-installed`, `partial`, or `installed`) using `references/project-detection.md`.
2. Check `~/.memorytree/alerts.json`. If pending alerts exist, display them to the user before proceeding.
3. If `not-installed`: run `memorytree init` to scaffold the workspace, then report what was created.
4. If `partial`: run `memorytree upgrade` to add missing pieces, then report what was added.
5. If `installed`: read the active goal, bound todo, and latest chat log. Report the current state (goal summary, todo progress, pending tasks) and ask the user what they want to work on next. If `memorytree daemon status` shows the heartbeat is not registered, ask the user whether they want the recommended current-repository setup via `memorytree daemon quick-start --root <repo>` or only a machine-level scheduler restore via `memorytree daemon install --interval 5m --auto-push true`. Use `memorytree daemon register` only when they explicitly want custom branch, interval, report-port, or worktree settings. Use plain-text questions compatible with all AI assistants, not client-specific UI components.

Do not stop after detection to ask whether you should proceed. Act on the result immediately.

## Core Behavior

1. Detect the repo state before changing files. Use `references/project-detection.md`.
2. If MemoryTree is missing, initialize it with `memorytree init`. If the CLI is not available, create the files from `assets/templates/`.
3. If MemoryTree is partial, upgrade it with `memorytree upgrade` before manual maintenance.
4. If MemoryTree is already installed, maintain only the active goal, bound todo, and current chat log. Use `references/update-rules.md`.
5. Keep the installation compatible with the host repo's branch, PR, CI, and review rules. Use `references/git-policy.md`.
6. Prefer safe defaults: do not add reply suffix requirements unless the host repository already requires them, do not mix code-and-memory commits by default, and do not override branch policy. MemoryTree-only git automation is allowed only inside the isolated flow in `references/git-policy.md`.
7. When locale is not explicit, choose it from repo language first, then system language. Use `references/locale-selection.md`.
8. Keep reply language aligned with user language first, then repo locale. Use `references/response-language.md`.
9. For partial repos, use the non-destructive upgrade path before manual maintenance. Use `references/upgrade-path.md`.
10. When transcript archival is enabled, import transcripts with deterministic code, preserve raw transcripts as evidence in both the current repo mirror and the global archive, generate cleaned Markdown for indexing, keep cross-project backfills and ambiguous ownership cases in the global archive only, and ask once per repository whether raw transcript files may be committed or pushed. Use `references/transcript-archive.md`.
11. When CLI commands are needed, use `memorytree <subcommand>` (requires Node.js 鈮?20). If Node.js is not available, fall back to manual scaffolding from `assets/templates/`. See `references/execution-environment.md`.
12. Transcript discovery, import, cleaning, and push are handled by the background heartbeat process. The model only writes chat log summaries and updates goals and todos. See `references/heartbeat-scheduling.md`.
13. Global configuration is stored in `~/.memorytree/config.toml`. See `references/global-configuration.md`.
14. When the user asks to see their most recent conversation, trigger an on-demand transcript sync for the current project, locate the latest session across all three clients, and generate a continuation summary. See `references/transcript-archive.md` and `references/heartbeat-scheduling.md`.
15. All interactive prompts (heartbeat install, configuration, session continuity) must use plain-text questions compatible with every AI assistant that supports this skill. Do not rely on client-specific UI components. See `references/heartbeat-scheduling.md`.

## Read Order

1. Repo `AGENTS.md`, if present.
2. Latest file in `Memory/01_goals/`.
3. Latest todo bound to that goal in `Memory/02_todos/`.
4. `Memory/04_knowledge/` only when needed.
5. `Memory/06_transcripts/clean/`, transcript manifests, and repo-local raw transcript mirrors only when transcript history or cross-project memory search is relevant.
6. `Memory/03_chat_logs/` and `Memory/05_archive/` only when needed.

## Detect

1. Check whether `Memory/` exists and matches the layout in `references/memory-layout.md`.
2. Classify the repo as `not-installed`, `partial`, or `installed`.
3. If the repo already has stronger rules than the generated templates, preserve the repo rules and only add missing MemoryTree pieces.

## Upgrade

1. Use `memorytree upgrade` for repositories that already have `AGENTS.md`, custom policy files, or partial `Memory/` content.
2. Preserve existing repo policy files by default.
3. Create only the missing MemoryTree pieces.
4. Read the upgrade result and treat `agents_merge_required=true` as a manual review task, not an overwrite instruction.

## Initialize

1. Run `memorytree init --root <repo>` and pass `--project-name`, `--goal-summary`, and `--locale` when the user already provided them.
2. Use fresh init only when the repo does not already have `AGENTS.md` or another repo policy source such as a policy-bearing `CONTRIBUTING.md`, PR templates, `CODEOWNERS`, or commitlint config. If repo policy already exists, switch to `memorytree upgrade` instead of trying to skip `AGENTS.md`.
3. Review the generated `AGENTS.md` before keeping it. Merge it with the repo's existing policy if needed.
4. Keep the initial installation minimal: `Memory/01_goals`, `02_todos`, `03_chat_logs`, optional `04_knowledge`, `05_archive`, and `06_transcripts` only when transcript archival is enabled for the repo or needed for transcript import.
5. Use the locale-specific template files in `assets/templates/<locale>/` as the source of truth for first-run scaffolding.
6. Prefer `--locale auto` when the user did not request a language explicitly.
7. Use `memorytree locale` when you need a deterministic locale check without scaffolding files.
8. If Node.js is not available, create first-run files directly from `assets/templates/` instead of requiring a runtime installation.
9. If transcript archival is enabled for the repo, use `memorytree import --source <file>` for one explicit source file and `memorytree discover` when scanning local client stores. Matching transcripts must update both the repo mirror and the global archive, while unrelated projects, ambiguous ownership cases, or mismatched explicit sources are archived in the global archive only. Let the CLI generate cleaned transcripts deterministically without spending model tokens on the cleaning step.
10. Ask once whether raw transcript files may also be committed to the repository. Record the answer in `AGENTS.md`, keep the files in the repo either way, and exclude `raw` files from automatic staging until the user says yes.

## Maintain

1. Change the active goal only after explicit user confirmation of a scope or requirement change.
2. Update the active todo when progress changes, milestones move, or the next task becomes clearer.
3. Append chat logs only. Never rewrite or delete prior entries.
4. Keep active files small. Move stale context to archive or knowledge files instead of bloating the active goal or todo.
5. Treat product ideas, architecture decisions, and operating constraints as goal or knowledge content. Treat step-by-step execution state as todo content.
6. Treat cleaned transcript indexes as discovery aids, not as the final source of truth. When exact wording matters, confirm against the raw transcript archive.
7. Prefer deterministic CLI-based transcript cleaning over manual rewriting. Do not spend model tokens to restate or normalize transcript content when `memorytree import` can do it.
8. Reply in the user's language when clear; otherwise align with repo locale without rewriting existing files just to translate them.

## Git And Safety

1. Never assume MemoryTree can override the repo's branch model.
2. Default to isolated MemoryTree-only Git operations: stage only MemoryTree-owned files, use a MemoryTree-scoped commit title, push to a dedicated branch, and open a dedicated PR.
3. Enable auto-merge only for MemoryTree-only PRs, and only when the repository still enforces its required review and CI checks.
4. Keep repo-local raw transcript mirrors and the global transcript archive synchronized on every import. The global index must remain safe for concurrent multi-project updates.
5. Keep the repository mirror limited to transcripts that belong to the current repository. Unrelated or ambiguous transcripts belong in the global archive only.
6. Keep raw transcript files under `Memory/06_transcripts/raw/**` in the repo, but exclude them from automatic staging until the user explicitly approved raw transcript uploads for that repository.
7. If the diff mixes product code, shared policy files, cross-project transcript archives, or unclear ownership, stop and ask the user before committing or pushing.
8. If the repo has protected branches or PR-only rules, follow them even if older MemoryTree rules say otherwise.
9. When `auto_push` is enabled, the heartbeat process pushes automatically after committing. If no Git remote is configured, the push is skipped. If a push fails, the heartbeat retries once. In either case an alert is written to `~/.memorytree/alerts.json`. See `references/git-policy.md`.
10. During transcript cleaning, the heartbeat scans for sensitive information (API keys, passwords, tokens). Matches are logged as warnings only 鈥?no automatic deletion or redaction. See `references/heartbeat-scheduling.md`.

11. Do not modify the host repository's CI or E2E workflow definitions by default. If the user explicitly approves a MemoryTree-only optimization, prefer path-filtered or lightweight workflows for `Memory/**` and managed `AGENTS.md` PRs without weakening required branch protection.

## Resources

- `references/project-detection.md`: detect install state and choose init vs maintain.
- `references/memory-layout.md`: folder and file naming rules.
- `references/update-rules.md`: when to version goals, todos, and session logs.
- `references/git-policy.md`: safe Git defaults and policy merge guidance.
- `references/locale-selection.md`: locale choice rules and alias behavior.
- `references/response-language.md`: reply-language precedence and translation safety.
- `references/transcript-archive.md`: raw transcript archival, clean transcript indexing, per-client source rules, and repo upload confirmation rules.
- `references/upgrade-path.md`: safe adoption flow for partial repos.
- `references/execution-environment.md`: how to run MemoryTree CLI (requires Node.js 鈮?20).
- `references/heartbeat-scheduling.md`: background heartbeat architecture, daemon CLI, and execution flow.
- `references/global-configuration.md`: `~/.memorytree/` directory layout, `config.toml` schema, and `alerts.json` format.
- `assets/templates/en/` and `assets/templates/zh-cn/`: seed files for English and Simplified Chinese initialization.
- CLI commands: `memorytree init`, `memorytree upgrade`, `memorytree import`, `memorytree discover`, `memorytree locale`, `memorytree recall`, `memorytree daemon install|uninstall|run-once|watch|status|quick-start|register`.

Output:
 140: 
 141: 不要只按固定轮次压缩，建议组合四类信号：
 142: 
 143: - `轮次触发`
 144:   - 例如累计 2-4 个 user turn
 145: - `token 触发`
 146:   - 当前活跃上下文接近预算上限
 147: - `主题漂移触发`
 148:   - 文件集、关键词、意图明显变化
 149: - `工具洪峰触发`
 150:   - 出现大段代码、日志、终端输出
 151: 
 152: ### 3.5 Session Tree 的核心字段
 153: 
 154: 建议每个节点至少有：
 155: 
 156: - `id`
 157: - `session_id`
 158: - `node_type`
 159: - `parent_id`
 160: - `child_ids`
 161: - `title`
 162: - `summary`
 163: - `anchor_text`
 164: - `keywords`
 165: - `scope_id`
 166: - `evidence_refs`
 167: - `raw_refs`
 168: - `created_at`
 169: - `updated_at`
 170: - `weight`
 171: 
 172: ### 3.6 Session Tree 的 probe 路径
 173: 
 174: 单会话检索建议固定为：
 175: 
 176: 1. `probe_main(session_id)`
 177: 2. `probe_branch(milestone_id | stage_id)`
 178: 3. `probe_leaf(batch_id | leaf_id)`
 179: 4. `hydrate_raw(raw_ref)`
 180: 
 181: ### 3.7 Session 层停止规则
 182: 
 183: - 主线节点已足够回答，停止
 184: - 分支节点已补足细节，停止
 185: - 叶子节点已提供可验证证据，停止
 186: - 必须核对原文时才回填 raw
 187: 
 188: ---
 189: 
 190: ## 4. Repo Tree：单一仓库的记忆树
 283: ### 4.6 Repo Tree 的 probe 路径
 284: 
 285: 建议单仓库检索时按以下顺序：
 286: 
 287: 1. `probe_repo_main(repo_id)`
 288: 2. `probe_workstream(branch_id)`
 289: 3. `probe_milestone(node_id)`
 290: 4. `probe_session_leaf(node_id)`
 291: 5. `hydrate_raw(ref)`
 292: 
 293: ### 4.7 Repo Tree 典型回答场景
 294: 
 295: Repo Tree 应能稳定回答：
 296: 
 297: - 为什么这个仓库走到今天这条路
 298: - 某条 workstream 曾经踩过哪些坑
 299: - 当前阶段有哪些已定决策
 300: - 哪些实践已经上升为 skill
 301: 
 302: ---
 303: 
 304: ## 5. Global Memory Forest：所有仓库的全局记忆森林
 305: 
 306: ### 5.1 为什么不是“一棵全局树”
 307: 
 308: 所有仓库之上不建议强行做成一棵树，因为：
 309: 
 310: - 一个仓库可能同时属于多个主题
 311: - 一个 skill 会跨多个仓库
 312: - 一个决策可能跨工作、个人、家庭
 313: - 权限隔离与分身授权难以落到单树上
 314: 
 315: 因此，全局层更适合：
 316: 
 317: **森林负责压缩导航，图负责跨域关联。**
 318: 
 319: ### 5.2 建议结构
 320: 
 321: ```text
 322: GlobalForest
 323: ├── ScopeRoot(work)
 324: │   ├── RepoRoot(openmnemo)
 325: │   ├── RepoRoot(client-a)
 326: │   └── RepoRoot(content-studio)
 327: ├── ScopeRoot(personal)
 328: │   ├── RepoRoot(life-os)
 329: │   └── RepoRoot(reading-notes)
 330: ├── ScopeRoot(family)
 331: └── ScopeRoot(shared)
 332: ```
 333: 
 334: ### 5.3 Global 层的核心作用
 335: 
 353: ### 5.5 Global 层与 Graph Layer 的关系
 354: 
 355: Global Forest 不是 Graph 的替代品。
 356: 
 357: 建议分工：
 358: 
 359: - `Forest`
 360:   - 压缩导航
 361:   - 分区隔离
 362:   - 长期主线
 363: 
 364: - `Graph`
 365:   - 跨 scope 关联
 366:   - 跨 repo skill 迁移
 367:   - 跨主题灵感串联
 368: 
 369: ### 5.6 分身在 Global 层的形态
 370: 
 371: “每个分身都有自己独立的记忆树”应解释为：
 372: 
 373: **每个分身拥有自己独立的记忆树视图。**
 374: 
 375: 视图由以下维度裁剪：
 376: 
 377: - `scope`
 378: - `project`
 379: - `persona`
 380: - `privacy_level`
 381: - `allow_cross_scope`
 382: 
 383: 例如：
 384: 
 385: - 工作分身默认只能看 `work`
 386: - 家庭分身默认只能看 `family`
 387: - 战略分身可看 `work + shared`
 388: - 只有显式授权时才允许跨 scope 引入敏感内容
 389: 
 390: ---
 426: - 是否已覆盖用户问题中的核心实体/时间/项目
 427: 
 428: ### 6.4 兜底入口
 429: 
 430: 当 tree probe 不足以命中时，可开放：
 431: 
 432: - `full_search(query, scope)`
 433: 
 434: 它不直接进回答，而是：

 227:

 231:   - 先拿主干节点

 237:   - 查看具体叶子或小归档
 238: 
 239: - `hydrate_raw(ref)`
 240:   - 必要时回填原始对话或原始文档

# 2026-03-24 13:15 Session Log

---
Time: 2026-03-24 13:15
User: Continued the planning discussion after confirming the higher-level direction around “创造资产内核”.
Assistant: Reframed OpenMnemo from a pure memory base into an open creation-asset kernel. Confirmed the three primary asset classes as 创作结果 / 创作过程 / 创作能力, clarified that deer-flow-like systems should be treated as possible upper-layer product forms rather than the kernel itself, and proposed that the open-source core should focus on asset modeling, Git/Gitea-native storage, memory-tree navigation, probe-style retrieval, and minimal runtime interfaces. Then wrote a new goal version, bound todo, and a dedicated knowledge note that defines `ProductAsset / MemoryAsset / SkillAsset`, their shared `BaseAsset` fields, the minimal memory-tree node hierarchy, and the probe retrieval interface.

---
Time: 2026-03-24 13:26
User: Requested two review passes over the newly written planning documents and then approved fixing the document issues.
Assistant: Performed two documentation review passes. The first pass found a planning continuity issue where the new active todo had dropped still-open implementation work from the previous active todo, plus a positioning conflict where the earlier unified Doubao knowledge note still framed OpenMnemo as a “个人 AI 记忆底座” instead of the newly confirmed “创造资产内核”. The second pass checked the new asset model against the current codebase and found two more design risks: `source_asset` had been mapped too loosely toward `ProductAsset`, and the documents had not yet explained how the new `ProductAsset / MemoryAsset / SkillAsset` model should coexist with the current `DataLayerAPI` runtime kinds (`session / memory_unit / source_asset / archive_anchor / mixed`). Updated the goal, todo, and knowledge docs to carry forward still-open implementation work, align the north-star wording, narrow the `source_asset` mapping, and add a compatibility-bridge note that keeps the current data-layer API as the runtime surface while the new asset model lands first as a projection layer.

---
Time: 2026-03-24 13:35
User: Confirmed continuing the discussion on memory and context compression, and explicitly asked for a plan covering a single-session memory tree, a per-repository memory tree, an all-repositories memory tree, and compression planning for different model context lengths.
Assistant: Re-read the two referenced Doubao documents and distilled the usable theory into a concrete architectural proposal. Confirmed that the viable direction is not “compress the facts” but “compress the path into context”, then formalized a three-tier navigation structure: `Session Tree` for one conversation, `Repo Tree` for one repository, and `Global Memory Forest` across repositories. Clarified that Git/Gitea should remain the fact/version layer rather than be treated as the runtime memory tree itself, and that “each avatar has its own memory tree” should be implemented as isolated tree views rather than physical full copies. Added a dedicated knowledge note defining the four core pieces of the compression architecture: `Session Tree`, `Repo Tree`, `Global Memory Forest`, and `Model Budget Profiles`, along with the associated `Probe Pipeline`.

Output:
  71: ## 3. Session Tree：单一会话的记忆树
  72: 
  73: ### 3.1 目标
  74: 
  75: Session Tree 的目标是：
  76: 
  77: - 让超长对话不会线性膨胀
  78: - 让当前模型始终只读会话中的最小必要片段
  79: - 让会话内部的主线、分支、细节都可被追踪
  80: 
  81: ### 3.2 最小层级
  82: 
  83: 建议固定为四层：
  84: 
  85: ```text
  86: SessionRoot
  87: ├── StageNode
  88: │   ├── MilestoneNode
  89: │   │   ├── ArchiveBatch
  90: │   │   │   ├── ConversationLeaf
  91: │   │   │   ├── ConversationLeaf
  92: │   │   │   └── ConversationLeaf
  93: ```
  94: 
  95: ### 3.3 各层职责
  96: 
  97: #### `ConversationLeaf`
  98: 
  99: 最小语义单元，不建议死板绑定“每 3 轮”。
 100: 
 101: 更合理的触发单位：
 102: 
 103: - 1-3 个 user turn
 104: - 一个明确主题片段
 105: - 一次大型工具输出
 106: - 一次明确的结论或转折
 107: 
 108: #### `ArchiveBatch`
 109: 
 110: 小范围收敛节点。
 111: 
 112: 职责：
 113: 
 114: - 聚合若干相近 leaf
 115: - 形成局部锚点
 116: - 保留局部线索与局部主题
 117: 
 118: #### `MilestoneNode`
 119: 
 120: 阶段性里程碑。
 121: 
 122: 建议只记录高价值内容：
 123: 
 124: - 形成了什么结论
 125: - 做了什么决策
 126: - 确立了什么约束
 127: - 暂时未解决什么问题
 128: 
 129: #### `StageNode`
 130: 
 131: 更高层的会话主线节点。
 132: 
 133: 职责：
 134: 
 135: - 标识会话当前阶段
 560: 
 561: - `memory_unit`
 562:   - 更接近 Session Tree 的 leaf 层素材
 563: 
 564: - `archive_anchor`
 565:   - 更接近 Session Tree / Repo Tree 的锚点层素材
 566: 
 567: - `source_asset`
 568:   - 更接近来源/证据层对象
 569: 
 570: - `session`
 571:   - 更接近当前的会话级容器对象
 572: 
 573: ### 8.2 短期不要做的事
 574: 
 575: - 不要立刻用新树模型替换现有 `DataLayerAPI`
 576: - 不要把 Git commit 树直接当运行时树
 577: - 不要把所有仓库强行塞成一棵树
 578: - 不要为每个分身物理复制全量记忆
 579: 
 580: ### 8.3 短期建议路线
 581: 
 582: #### Phase A
 583: 
 584: - 先把 Session Tree 落成正式数据结构
 585: - 让 `memory_unit + archive_anchor` 能映射到 `leaf / batch / milestone`
 586: 
 587: #### Phase B
 588: 
 589: - 在 Repo 级别引入 workstream / repo milestone
 590: - 让 repo 查询不再只靠 session 聚合

我在同步 todo 的时候，会把“设计已完成”和“还没进入实现级契约”分开写清楚，这样后面我们推进 schema、storage mapping、tool contract 时不会再混在一起。

*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: d:\demo1\openmnemo\Memory\04_knowledge\OpenMnemo_记忆树与上下文压缩架构_v1_2026-03-24.md
@@
 - `轮次触发`
   - 例如累计 2-4 个 user turn
 - `token 触发`
   - 当前活跃上下文接近预算上限
 - `主题漂移触发`
-  - 文件集、关键词、意图明显变化
+  - 文件集、关键词、意图、人物/项目/任务焦点明显变化
+  - 对纯对话场景，可按目标、人物、事件、时间段的切换判定
 - `工具洪峰触发`
   - 出现大段代码、日志、终端输出
@@
-单会话检索建议固定为：
+单会话检索建议复用统一最小接口，不再为 session 层单独发明一套公开 API：
 
-1. `probe_main(session_id)`
-2. `probe_branch(milestone_id | stage_id)`
-3. `probe_leaf(batch_id | leaf_id)`
+1. `probe_main(query, session_id)`
+2. `probe_branch(node_id, query?)`
+3. `probe_leaf(node_id)`
 4. `hydrate_raw(raw_ref)`
+
+其中 `session_id` 是 `root_ref`，`milestone / stage` 与 `batch / leaf` 通过 `node_type` 区分。
@@
-```text
-GlobalForest
-├── ScopeRoot(work)
-│   ├── RepoRoot(openmnemo)
-│   ├── RepoRoot(client-a)
-│   └── RepoRoot(content-studio)
-├── ScopeRoot(personal)
-│   ├── RepoRoot(life-os)
-│   └── RepoRoot(reading-notes)
-├── ScopeRoot(family)
-└── ScopeRoot(shared)
-```
+```text
+GlobalForest
+├── RepoIndex
+│   ├── RepoRoot(openmnemo)
+│   ├── RepoRoot(client-a)
+│   ├── RepoRoot(content-studio)
+│   ├── RepoRoot(life-os)
+│   └── RepoRoot(reading-notes)
+├── ScopeView(work)
+│   ├── Mount(openmnemo)
+│   ├── Mount(client-a)
+│   └── Mount(content-studio)
+├── ScopeView(personal)
+│   ├── Mount(life-os)
+│   └── Mount(reading-notes)
+├── ScopeView(family)
+└── ScopeView(shared)
+    └── Mount(openmnemo: shared skill / public milestone)
+```
+
+说明：
+
+- `RepoRoot` 是底层唯一身份
+- `ScopeView` 只保存挂载关系或投影视图，不复制 repo 原文
+- 同一 repo 可同时挂到多个 scope，是否可见由权限与视图层裁剪决定
@@
-建议单仓库检索时按以下顺序：
+建议单仓库检索时也复用同一套最小接口：
 
-1. `probe_repo_main(repo_id)`
-2. `probe_workstream(branch_id)`
-3. `probe_milestone(node_id)`
-4. `probe_session_leaf(node_id)`
-5. `hydrate_raw(ref)`
+1. `probe_main(query, repo_id)`
+2. `probe_branch(node_id, query?)`
+3. `probe_leaf(node_id)`
+4. `hydrate_raw(ref)`
+
+其中 `workstream / repo milestone / session leaf / artifact leaf` 仍通过 `node_type` 区分，不再额外暴露 `probe_repo_main / probe_workstream` 这类平行公开接口。
@@
 当 tree probe 不足以命中时，可开放：
 
-- `full_search(query, scope)`
+- `full_search(query, scope_id)`
+
+它属于兜底检索，而不是 tree 的最小公开接口。
 
 它不直接进回答，而是：
*** Update File: d:\demo1\openmnemo\Memory\04_knowledge\创造资产内核对象模型_2026-03-24.md
@@
 建议最小接口为：
 
-- `probe_main(query, scope)`
-  - 先拿主干节点
+- `probe_main(query, root_ref)`
+  - 先拿主干节点，`root_ref` 可为 `session_id / repo_id / scope_id`
 
-- `probe_branch(node_id)`
-  - 展开某个里程碑下的分支
+- `probe_branch(node_id, query?)`
+  - 展开某个里程碑、stage、workstream 下的分支
 
 - `probe_leaf(node_id)`
-  - 查看具体叶子或小归档
+  - 查看具体叶子、小归档或 artifact leaf
 
 - `hydrate_raw(ref)`
   - 必要时回填原始对话或原始文档
+
+- `probe_repo_main / probe_workstream`
+  - 可作为内部 wrapper，但不建议成为公共最小接口
*** Update File: d:\demo1\openmnemo\Memory\02_todos\todo_v003_001_20260324.md
@@
 - [ ] 将现有 `memory_unit / source_asset / archive_anchor` 与 `ProductAsset / MemoryAsset / SkillAsset` 建立正式映射
-- [ ] 明确记忆树最小节点层级：`ConversationLeaf / ArchiveBatch / MilestoneNode / StageNode`
-- [ ] 明确探针式检索最小接口：`probe_main / probe_branch / probe_leaf / hydrate_raw`
-- [ ] 形成 `Session Tree / Repo Tree / Global Memory Forest / Budget Profiles` 的统一设计稿
+- [x] 明确记忆树最小节点层级：`ConversationLeaf / ArchiveBatch / MilestoneNode / StageNode`
+- [x] 明确探针式检索最小接口：`probe_main(query, root_ref) / probe_branch(node_id, query?) / probe_leaf(node_id) / hydrate_raw`
+- [x] 形成 `Session Tree / Repo Tree / Global Memory Forest / Budget Profiles` 的统一设计稿
+- [ ] 将统一设计稿收敛为实现级 schema、storage mapping 与 tool contract
 - [ ] 明确三类资产的共享基类字段、索引字段、关系字段、版本字段
 - [ ] 明确三类资产模型与当前 `DataLayerAPI` 的兼容桥，避免形成两套平行运行时对象
 - [ ] 明确开源核心边界与上层产品边界，避免后续将 deer-flow 类执行层误塞入内核
@@
 ### Milestone 2：导航与检索收口
 
-- [ ] 定义记忆树节点结构与收敛策略
-- [ ] 定义探针式检索路径与命中即止策略
-- [ ] 将 FTS / vector / graph / probe 纳入统一检索心智模型
-- [ ] 明确 Git/Gitea 在运行时中是“事实层/版本层”，而不是“运行时记忆树本身”
+- [x] 定义记忆树节点结构与收敛策略
+- [x] 定义探针式检索路径与命中即止策略
+- [x] 将 FTS / vector / graph / probe 纳入统一检索心智模型
+- [x] 明确 Git/Gitea 在运行时中是“事实层/版本层”，而不是“运行时记忆树本身”
*** End Patch

shell_command output=Exit code: 0 Wall time: 0.6 seconds Output: 不要只按固定轮次压缩，建议组合四类信号： - `轮次触发` - 例如累计 2-4 个 user turn - `token 触发` - 当前活跃上下文接近预算上限 - `主题漂移触发` - 文件集、关键词、意图明显变化 - `工具洪峰触发` - 出现大段代码、日志、...
Show output payload 
Exit code: 0
Wall time: 0.6 seconds
Output:

不要只按固定轮次压缩，建议组合四类信号：

- `轮次触发`
  - 例如累计 2-4 个 user turn
- `token 触发`
  - 当前活跃上下文接近预算上限
- `主题漂移触发`
  - 文件集、关键词、意图明显变化
- `工具洪峰触发`
  - 出现大段代码、日志、终端输出

### 3.5 Session Tree 的核心字段

建议每个节点至少有：

- `id`
- `session_id`
- `node_type`
- `parent_id`
- `child_ids`
- `title`
- `summary`
- `anchor_text`
- `keywords`
- `scope_id`
- `evidence_refs`
- `raw_refs`
- `created_at`
- `updated_at`
- `weight`

### 3.6 Session Tree 的 probe 路径

单会话检索建议固定为：

1. `probe_main(session_id)`
2. `probe_branch(milestone_id | stage_id)`
3. `probe_leaf(batch_id | leaf_id)`
4. `hydrate_raw(raw_ref)`

### 3.7 Session 层停止规则

- 主线节点已足够回答，停止
- 分支节点已补足细节，停止
Tool Result #740 shell_command call_3O1Z9GtJheT2rGDKI6BcEGcc exit 0 06:21:10
shell_command output=Exit code: 0 Wall time: 0.6 seconds Output: ### 4.6 Repo Tree 的 probe 路径 建议单仓库检索时按以下顺序： 1. `probe_repo_main(repo_id)` 2. `probe_workstream(branch_id)` 3. `probe_milestone(node_i...
Show output payload 
Exit code: 0
Wall time: 0.6 seconds
Output:
### 4.6 Repo Tree 的 probe 路径

建议单仓库检索时按以下顺序：

1. `probe_repo_main(repo_id)`
2. `probe_workstream(branch_id)`
3. `probe_milestone(node_id)`
4. `probe_session_leaf(node_id)`
5. `hydrate_raw(ref)`

### 4.7 Repo Tree 典型回答场景

Repo Tree 应能稳定回答：

- 为什么这个仓库走到今天这条路
- 某条 workstream 曾经踩过哪些坑
- 当前阶段有哪些已定决策
- 哪些实践已经上升为 skill
Tool Result #741 shell_command call_uDvutHIIUpALObFe7qYONOYV exit 0 06:21:10
shell_command output=Exit code: 0 Wall time: 0.6 seconds Output: ### 5.2 建议结构 ```text GlobalForest ├── ScopeRoot(work) │ ├── RepoRoot(openmnemo) │ ├── RepoRoot(client-a) │ └── RepoRoot(content-studi...
Show output payload 
Exit code: 0
Wall time: 0.6 seconds
Output:
### 5.2 建议结构

```text
GlobalForest
├── ScopeRoot(work)
│   ├── RepoRoot(openmnemo)
│   ├── RepoRoot(client-a)
│   └── RepoRoot(content-studio)
├── ScopeRoot(personal)
│   ├── RepoRoot(life-os)
│   └── RepoRoot(reading-notes)
├── ScopeRoot(family)
└── ScopeRoot(shared)
```

### 5.3 Global 层的核心作用

- 做跨仓库导航
- 做跨分区授权视图
- 做长期目标与长期主题聚合

当 tree probe 不足以命中时，可开放：

- `full_search(query, scope)`

它不直接进回答，而是：

2. 再回到 probe 路径逐层展开

*** Update File: d:\demo1\openmnemo\Memory\04_knowledge\OpenMnemo_记忆树与上下文压缩架构_v1_2026-03-24.md

 - `token 触发`
   - 当前活跃上下文接近预算上限
 - `主题漂移触发`
-  - 文件集、关键词、意图明显变化
+  - 文件集、关键词、意图、人物/项目/任务焦点明显变化
+  - 对纯对话场景，可按目标、人物、事件、时间段的切换判定
 - `工具洪峰触发`
   - 出现大段代码、日志、终端输出
@@
-单会话检索建议固定为：
+单会话检索建议复用统一最小接口，不再为 session 层单独发明一套公开 API：
 
-1. `probe_main(session_id)`
-2. `probe_branch(milestone_id | stage_id)`
-3. `probe_leaf(batch_id | leaf_id)`
+1. `probe_main(query, session_id)`
+2. `probe_branch(node_id, query?)`
+3. `probe_leaf(node_id)`
 4. `hydrate_raw(raw_ref)`
+
+其中 `session_id` 是 `root_ref`，`milestone / stage` 与 `batch / leaf` 通过 `node_type` 区分。
@@
-建议单仓库检索时按以下顺序：
+建议单仓库检索时也复用同一套最小接口：
 
-1. `probe_repo_main(repo_id)`
-2. `probe_workstream(branch_id)`
-3. `probe_milestone(node_id)`
-4. `probe_session_leaf(node_id)`
-5. `hydrate_raw(ref)`
+1. `probe_main(query, repo_id)`
+2. `probe_branch(node_id, query?)`
+3. `probe_leaf(node_id)`
+4. `hydrate_raw(ref)`
+
+其中 `workstream / repo milestone / session leaf / artifact leaf` 仍通过 `node_type` 区分，不再额外暴露 `probe_repo_main / probe_workstream` 这类平行公开接口。
@@
-```text
-GlobalForest
-├── ScopeRoot(work)
-│   ├── RepoRoot(openmnemo)
-│   ├── RepoRoot(client-a)
-│   └── RepoRoot(content-studio)
-├── ScopeRoot(personal)
-│   ├── RepoRoot(life-os)
-│   └── RepoRoot(reading-notes)
-├── ScopeRoot(family)
-└── ScopeRoot(shared)
-```
+```text
+GlobalForest
+├── RepoIndex
+│   ├── RepoRoot(openmnemo)
+│   ├── RepoRoot(client-a)
+│   ├── RepoRoot(content-studio)
+│   ├── RepoRoot(life-os)
+│   └── RepoRoot(reading-notes)
+├── ScopeView(work)
+│   ├── Mount(openmnemo)
+│   ├── Mount(client-a)
+│   └── Mount(content-studio)
+├── ScopeView(personal)
+│   ├── Mount(life-os)
+│   └── Mount(reading-notes)
+├── ScopeView(family)
+└── ScopeView(shared)
+    └── Mount(openmnemo: shared skill / public milestone)
+```
+
+说明：
+
+- `RepoRoot` 是底层唯一身份
+- `ScopeView` 只保存挂载关系或投影视图，不复制 repo 原文
+- 同一 repo 可同时挂到多个 scope，是否可见由权限与视图层裁剪决定
@@
-当 tree probe 不足以命中时，可开放：
-
-- `full_search(query, scope)`
+当 tree probe 不足以命中时，可开放：
+
+- `full_search(query, scope_id)`
+
+它属于兜底检索，而不是 tree 的最小公开接口。
 
 它不直接进回答，而是：
*** Update File: d:\demo1\openmnemo\Memory\04_knowledge\创造资产内核对象模型_2026-03-24.md
@@
 建议最小接口为：
 
-- `probe_main(query, scope)`
-  - 先拿主干节点
+- `probe_main(query, root_ref)`
+  - 先拿主干节点，`root_ref` 可为 `session_id / repo_id / scope_id`
 
-- `probe_branch(node_id)`
-  - 展开某个里程碑下的分支
+- `probe_branch(node_id, query?)`
+  - 展开某个里程碑、stage、workstream 下的分支
 
 - `probe_leaf(node_id)`
-  - 查看具体叶子或小归档
+  - 查看具体叶子、小归档或 artifact leaf
 
 - `hydrate_raw(ref)`
   - 必要时回填原始对话或原始文档
+
+- `probe_repo_main / probe_workstream`
+  - 可作为内部 wrapper，但不建议成为公共最小接口
*** Update File: d:\demo1\openmnemo\Memory\02_todos\todo_v003_001_20260324.md
@@
-- [ ] 将现有 `memory_unit / source_asset / archive_anchor` 与 `ProductAsset / MemoryAsset / SkillAsset` 建立正式映射
-- [ ] 明确记忆树最小节点层级：`ConversationLeaf / ArchiveBatch / MilestoneNode / StageNode`
-- [ ] 明确探针式检索最小接口：`probe_main / probe_branch / probe_leaf / hydrate_raw`
-- [ ] 形成 `Session Tree / Repo Tree / Global Memory Forest / Budget Profiles` 的统一设计稿
+- [ ] 将现有 `memory_unit / source_asset / archive_anchor` 与 `ProductAsset / MemoryAsset / SkillAsset` 建立正式映射
+- [x] 明确记忆树最小节点层级：`ConversationLeaf / ArchiveBatch / MilestoneNode / StageNode`
+- [x] 明确探针式检索最小接口：`probe_main(query, root_ref) / probe_branch(node_id, query?) / probe_leaf(node_id) / hydrate_raw`
+- [x] 形成 `Session Tree / Repo Tree / Global Memory Forest / Budget Profiles` 的统一设计稿
+- [ ] 将统一设计稿收敛为实现级 schema、storage mapping 与 tool contract
 - [ ] 明确三类资产的共享基类字段、索引字段、关系字段、版本字段
 - [ ] 明确三类资产模型与当前 `DataLayerAPI` 的兼容桥，避免形成两套平行运行时对象
 - [ ] 明确开源核心边界与上层产品边界，避免后续将 deer-flow 类执行层误塞入内核
@@

-- [ ] 明确 Git/Gitea 在运行时中是“事实层/版本层”，而不是“运行时记忆树本身”

  16: - [x] 明确探针式检索最小接口：`probe_main(query, root_ref) / probe_branch(node_id, query?) / probe_leaf(node_id) / hydrate_raw`
  17: - [x] 形成 `Session Tree / Repo Tree / Global Memory Forest / Budget Profiles` 的统一设计稿
  18: - [ ] 将统一设计稿收敛为实现级 schema、storage mapping 与 tool contract
  19: - [ ] 明确三类资产的共享基类字段、索引字段、关系字段、版本字段
  20: - [ ] 明确三类资产模型与当前 `DataLayerAPI` 的兼容桥，避免形成两套平行运行时对象
  21: - [ ] 明确开源核心边界与上层产品边界，避免后续将 deer-flow 类执行层误塞入内核
  41: 
  42: ### Milestone 2：导航与检索收口
  43: 
  44: - [x] 定义记忆树节点结构与收敛策略
  45: - [x] 定义探针式检索路径与命中即止策略
  46: - [x] 将 FTS / vector / graph / probe 纳入统一检索心智模型
  47: - [x] 明确 Git/Gitea 在运行时中是“事实层/版本层”，而不是“运行时记忆树本身”
Tool Result #765 shell_command call_4qNcWSutXSZLcBgNqwatEkVD exit 0 06:22:22
shell_command output=Exit code: 0 Wall time: 0.6 seconds Output: 141: 不要只按固定轮次压缩，建议组合四类信号： 142: 143: - `轮次触发` 144: - 例如累计 2-4 个 user turn 145: - `token 触发` 146: - 当前活跃上下文接近预算上限 147: - `主题漂移触发` 148: ...
Show output payload 
Exit code: 0
Wall time: 0.6 seconds
Output:
 141: 不要只按固定轮次压缩，建议组合四类信号：
 142: 
 143: - `轮次触发`
 144:   - 例如累计 2-4 个 user turn
 145: - `token 触发`
 146:   - 当前活跃上下文接近预算上限
 147: - `主题漂移触发`
 148:   - 文件集、关键词、意图、人物/项目/任务焦点明显变化
 149:   - 对纯对话场景，可按目标、人物、事件、时间段的切换判定
 150: - `工具洪峰触发`
 151:   - 出现大段代码、日志、终端输出
 152: 
 153: ### 3.5 Session Tree 的核心字段
 154: 
 155: 建议每个节点至少有：
 156: 
 157: - `id`
 158: - `session_id`
 159: - `node_type`
 160: - `parent_id`
 161: - `child_ids`
 162: - `title`
 163: - `summary`
 164: - `anchor_text`
 165: - `keywords`
 166: - `scope_id`
 167: - `evidence_refs`
 168: - `raw_refs`
 169: - `created_at`
 170: - `updated_at`
 171: - `weight`
 172: 
 173: ### 3.6 Session Tree 的 probe 路径
 174: 
 175: 单会话检索建议复用统一最小接口，不再为 session 层单独发明一套公开 API：
 176: 
 177: 1. `probe_main(query, session_id)`
 178: 2. `probe_branch(node_id, query?)`
 179: 3. `probe_leaf(node_id)`
 180: 4. `hydrate_raw(raw_ref)`
 181: 
 182: 其中 `session_id` 是 `root_ref`，`milestone / stage` 与 `batch / leaf` 通过 `node_type` 区分。
 183: 
 283: - ProductAsset 候选对象
 284: - SkillAsset 候选对象
 285: 
 286: ### 4.6 Repo Tree 的 probe 路径
 287: 
 288: 建议单仓库检索时也复用同一套最小接口：
 289: 
 290: 1. `probe_main(query, repo_id)`
 291: 2. `probe_branch(node_id, query?)`
 292: 3. `probe_leaf(node_id)`
 293: 4. `hydrate_raw(ref)`
 294: 
 295: 其中 `workstream / repo milestone / session leaf / artifact leaf` 仍通过 `node_type` 区分，不再额外暴露 `probe_repo_main / probe_workstream` 这类平行公开接口。
 296: 
 297: ### 4.7 Repo Tree 典型回答场景
 298: 
 299: Repo Tree 应能稳定回答：
 300: 
 301: - 为什么这个仓库走到今天这条路
 302: - 某条 workstream 曾经踩过哪些坑
 303: - 当前阶段有哪些已定决策
 304: - 哪些实践已经上升为 skill
 305: 
 306: ---
 307: 
 308: ## 5. Global Memory Forest：所有仓库的全局记忆森林
 309: 
 310: ### 5.1 为什么不是“一棵全局树”
 311: 
 312: 所有仓库之上不建议强行做成一棵树，因为：
 313: 
 314: - 一个仓库可能同时属于多个主题
 315: - 一个 skill 会跨多个仓库
 316: - 一个决策可能跨工作、个人、家庭
 317: - 权限隔离与分身授权难以落到单树上
 318: 
 319: 因此，全局层更适合：
 320: 
 321: **森林负责压缩导航，图负责跨域关联。**
 322: 
 323: ### 5.2 建议结构
 324: 
 325: ```text
 326: GlobalForest
 327: ├── RepoIndex
 328: │   ├── RepoRoot(openmnemo)
 329: │   ├── RepoRoot(client-a)
 330: │   ├── RepoRoot(content-studio)
 331: │   ├── RepoRoot(life-os)
 332: │   └── RepoRoot(reading-notes)
 333: ├── ScopeView(work)
 334: │   ├── Mount(openmnemo)
 335: │   ├── Mount(client-a)
 336: │   └── Mount(content-studio)
 337: ├── ScopeView(personal)
 338: │   ├── Mount(life-os)
 339: │   └── Mount(reading-notes)
 340: ├── ScopeView(family)
 341: └── ScopeView(shared)
 342:     └── Mount(openmnemo: shared skill / public milestone)
 343: ```
 344: 
 345: 说明：
 346: 
 347: - `RepoRoot` 是底层唯一身份
 348: - `ScopeView` 只保存挂载关系或投影视图，不复制 repo 原文
 349: - 同一 repo 可同时挂到多个 scope，是否可见由权限与视图层裁剪决定
 350: 
 446: 
 447: 当 tree probe 不足以命中时，可开放：
 448: 
 449: - `full_search(query, scope_id)`
 450: 
 451: 它属于兜底检索，而不是 tree 的最小公开接口。
 452: 
 453: 它不直接进回答，而是：
 454:

shell_command output=Exit code: 0 Wall time: 0.6 seconds Output: 226: ## 8. 探针式检索最小接口 227: 228: 建议最小接口为： 229: 230: - `probe_main(query, root_ref)` 231: - 先拿主干节点，`root_ref` 可为 `session_id / repo_id /...
Show output payload 
Exit code: 0
Wall time: 0.6 seconds
Output:
 226: ## 8. 探针式检索最小接口
 227: 
 228: 建议最小接口为：
 229: 
 230: - `probe_main(query, root_ref)`
 231:   - 先拿主干节点，`root_ref` 可为 `session_id / repo_id / scope_id`
 232: 
 233: - `probe_branch(node_id, query?)`
 234:   - 展开某个里程碑、stage、workstream 下的分支
 235: 
 236: - `probe_leaf(node_id)`
 237:   - 查看具体叶子、小归档或 artifact leaf
 238: 
 239: - `hydrate_raw(ref)`
 240:   - 必要时回填原始对话或原始文档
 241: 
 242: - `probe_repo_main / probe_workstream`
 243:   - 可作为内部 wrapper，但不建议成为公共最小接口

*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: d:\demo1\openmnemo\Memory\03_chat_logs\2026-03-24_13-15.md
@@
 Time: 2026-03-24 13:35
 User: Confirmed continuing the discussion on memory and context compression, and explicitly asked for a plan covering a single-session memory tree, a per-repository memory tree, an all-repositories memory tree, and compression planning for different model context lengths.
 Assistant: Re-read the two referenced Doubao documents and distilled the usable theory into a concrete architectural proposal. Confirmed that the viable direction is not “compress the facts” but “compress the path into context”, then formalized a three-tier navigation structure: `Session Tree` for one conversation, `Repo Tree` for one repository, and `Global Memory Forest` across repositories. Clarified that Git/Gitea should remain the fact/version layer rather than be treated as the runtime memory tree itself, and that “each avatar has its own memory tree” should be implemented as isolated tree views rather than physical full copies. Added a dedicated knowledge note defining the four core pieces of the compression architecture: `Session Tree`, `Repo Tree`, `Global Memory Forest`, and `Model Budget Profiles`, along with the associated `Probe Pipeline`.
+
+---
+Time: 2026-03-24 14:05
+User: Asked to fix the document issues found during the double review.
+Assistant: Repaired the planning documents without touching product code. Unified the public probe contract across the knowledge docs around `probe_main(query, root_ref) / probe_branch(node_id, query?) / probe_leaf(node_id) / hydrate_raw`, clarified that repo- or workstream-specific probe names should only remain internal wrappers, upgraded the Session Tree trigger rules so they also work for pure dialogue sessions rather than only code-heavy sessions, and rewrote the `Global Memory Forest` example from a single-parent `ScopeRoot -> RepoRoot` tree into a `RepoIndex + ScopeView + Mount` model so one repo can be projected into multiple scopes without duplicating raw memory. Also synchronized the active todo by marking the completed design items done and adding a new follow-up task to convert the unified design into implementation-level schema, storage mapping, and tool contracts.
*** End Patch

Output:

---
Time: 2026-03-24 13:15
User: Continued the planning discussion after confirming the higher-level direction around “创造资产内核”.
Assistant: Reframed OpenMnemo from a pure memory base into an open creation-asset kernel. Confirmed the three primary asset classes as 创作结果 / 创作过程 / 创作能力, clarified that deer-flow-like systems should be treated as possible upper-layer product forms rather than the kernel itself, and proposed that the open-source core should focus on asset modeling, Git/Gitea-native storage, memory-tree navigation, probe-style retrieval, and minimal runtime interfaces. Then wrote a new goal version, bound todo, and a dedicated knowledge note that defines `ProductAsset / MemoryAsset / SkillAsset`, their shared `BaseAsset` fields, the minimal memory-tree node hierarchy, and the probe retrieval interface.

---
Time: 2026-03-24 13:26
User: Requested two review passes over the newly written planning documents and then approved fixing the document issues.
Assistant: Performed two documentation review passes. The first pass found a planning continuity issue where the new active todo had dropped still-open implementation work from the previous active todo, plus a positioning conflict where the earlier unified Doubao knowledge note still framed OpenMnemo as a “个人 AI 记忆底座” instead of the newly confirmed “创造资产内核”. The second pass checked the new asset model against the current codebase and found two more design risks: `source_asset` had been mapped too loosely toward `ProductAsset`, and the documents had not yet explained how the new `ProductAsset / MemoryAsset / SkillAsset` model should coexist with the current `DataLayerAPI` runtime kinds (`session / memory_unit / source_asset / archive_anchor / mixed`). Updated the goal, todo, and knowledge docs to carry forward still-open implementation work, align the north-star wording, narrow the `source_asset` mapping, and add a compatibility-bridge note that keeps the current data-layer API as the runtime surface while the new asset model lands first as a projection layer.

---
Time: 2026-03-24 13:35
User: Confirmed continuing the discussion on memory and context compression, and explicitly asked for a plan covering a single-session memory tree, a per-repository memory tree, an all-repositories memory tree, and compression planning for different model context lengths.
Assistant: Re-read the two referenced Doubao documents and distilled the usable theory into a concrete architectural proposal. Confirmed that the viable direction is not “compress the facts” but “compress the path into context”, then formalized a three-tier navigation structure: `Session Tree` for one conversation, `Repo Tree` for one repository, and `Global Memory Forest` across repositories. Clarified that Git/Gitea should remain the fact/version layer rather than be treated as the runtime memory tree itself, and that “each avatar has its own memory tree” should be implemented as isolated tree views rather than physical full copies. Added a dedicated knowledge note defining the four core pieces of the compression architecture: `Session Tree`, `Repo Tree`, `Global Memory Forest`, and `Model Budget Profiles`, along with the associated `Probe Pipeline`.

---
Time: 2026-03-24 14:05
User: Asked to fix the document issues found during the double review.
Assistant: Repaired the planning documents without touching product code. Unified the public probe contract across the knowledge docs around `probe_main(query, root_ref) / probe_branch(node_id, query?) / probe_leaf(node_id) / hydrate_raw`, clarified that repo- or workstream-specific probe names should only remain internal wrappers, upgraded the Session Tree trigger rules so they also work for pure dialogue sessions rather than only code-heavy sessions, and rewrote the `Global Memory Forest` example from a single-parent `ScopeRoot -> RepoRoot` tree into a `RepoIndex + ScopeView + Mount` model so one repo can be projected into multiple scopes without duplicating raw memory. Also synchronized the active todo by marking the completed design items done and adding a new follow-up task to convert the unified design into implementation-level schema, storage mapping, and tool contracts.

assistant #787 final_answer 06:23:15

已修复。这次只动了 Memory 文档，没有改产品代码。

我收口了 4 个问题：
- 把公开 probe 接口统一成一套：probe_main(query, root_ref) / probe_branch(node_id, query?) / probe_leaf(node_id) / hydrate_raw，不再让 probe_repo_main 这类名字和公共接口并列。见 [OpenMnemo_记忆树与上下文压缩架构_v1_2026-03-24.md](d:/demo1/openmnemo/Memory/04_knowledge/OpenMnemo_记忆树与上下文压缩架构_v1_2026-03-24.md) 和 [创造资产内核对象模型_2026-03-24.md](d:/demo1/openmnemo/Memory/04_knowledge/创造资产内核对象模型_2026-03-24.md)
- 把 Global Forest 从“单归属树”改成了“RepoIndex + ScopeView + Mount”的逻辑挂载模型，这样一个 repo 可以同时出现在多个 scope 视图里，但底层仍只有一个 RepoRoot。见 [OpenMnemo_记忆树与上下文压缩架构_v1_2026-03-24.md](d:/demo1/openmnemo/Memory/04_knowledge/OpenMnemo_记忆树与上下文压缩架构_v1_2026-03-24.md)
- 补强了 Session Tree 的压缩触发规则，让它不只适配代码会话，也适配纯对话/记忆会话。见 [OpenMnemo_记忆树与上下文压缩架构_v1_2026-03-24.md](d:/demo1/openmnemo/Memory/04_knowledge/OpenMnemo_记忆树与上下文压缩架构_v1_2026-03-24.md)
- 同步了 active todo，把已经完成的设计项勾掉，并新增“把统一设计稿落成实现级 schema / storage mapping / tool contract”的后续任务。见 [todo_v003_001_20260324.md](d:/demo1/openmnemo/Memory/02_todos/todo_v003_001_20260324.md)

我也追加了本轮 session 记录到 [2026-03-24_13-15.md](d:/demo1/openmnemo/Memory/03_chat_logs/2026-03-24_13-15.md)。

下一步最值得做的，就是把这套文档继续下沉成一版“实现级 contract”：
1. tree 节点 schema
2. probe tool schema
3. Git/Gitea、RAG、graph 的存储映射

如果你愿意，我下一轮就直接开始写这份实现规格。

我收口了 4 个问题：
- 把公开 probe 接口统一成一套：probe_main(query, root_ref) / probe_branch(node_id, query?) / probe_leaf(node_id) / hydrate_raw，不再让 probe_repo_main 这类名字和公共接口并列。见 [OpenMnemo_记忆树与上下文压缩架构_v1_2026-03-24.md](d:/demo1/openmnemo/Memory/04_knowledge/OpenMnemo_记忆树与上下文压缩架构_v1_2026-03-24.md) 和 [创造资产内核对象模型_2026-03-24.md](d:/demo1/openmnemo/Memory/04_knowledge/创造资产内核对象模型_2026-03-24.md)
- 把 Global Forest 从“单归属树”改成了“RepoIndex + ScopeView + Mount”的逻辑挂载模型，这样一个 repo 可以同时出现在多个 scope 视图里，但底层仍只有一个 RepoRoot。见 [OpenMnemo_记忆树与上下文压缩架构_v1_2026-03-24.md](d:/demo1/openmnemo/Memory/04_knowledge/OpenMnemo_记忆树与上下文压缩架构_v1_2026-03-24.md)
- 补强了 Session Tree 的压缩触发规则，让它不只适配代码会话，也适配纯对话/记忆会话。见 [OpenMnemo_记忆树与上下文压缩架构_v1_2026-03-24.md](d:/demo1/openmnemo/Memory/04_knowledge/OpenMnemo_记忆树与上下文压缩架构_v1_2026-03-24.md)
- 同步了 active todo，把已经完成的设计项勾掉，并新增“把统一设计稿落成实现级 schema / storage mapping / tool contract”的后续任务。见 [todo_v003_001_20260324.md](d:/demo1/openmnemo/Memory/02_todos/todo_v003_001_20260324.md)

我也追加了本轮 session 记录到 [2026-03-24_13-15.md](d:/demo1/openmnemo/Memory/03_chat_logs/2026-03-24_13-15.md)。

下一步最值得做的，就是把这套文档继续下沉成一版“实现级 contract”：
1. tree 节点 schema
2. probe tool schema
3. Git/Gitea、RAG、graph 的存储映射

如果你愿意，我下一轮就直接开始写这份实现规格。

  "user_instructions": "# AGENTS.md\n\n## Read Order\n- Read this file first.\n- Read the latest file in `Memory/01_goals/`.\n- Read the latest todo bound to that goal in `Memory/02_todos/`.\n- Read `Memory/04_knowledge/` only when needed.\n- Read `Memory/06_transcripts/clean/` and transcript manifests only when needed.\n- Read `Memory/03_chat_logs/` and `Memory/05_archive/` only when needed.\n\n## Memory Rules\n- Change the active goal only after explicit user confirmation of a requirement or scope change.\n- Keep the active todo synchronized with the active goal.\n- Append chat logs only. Never rewrite or delete prior entries.\n- Keep active files concise and move stale context to knowledge or archive files.\n- Treat cleaned transcript indexes as search aids. Confirm exact wording against the raw transcript archive when precision matters.\n\n## Transcript Rules\n- If transcript archival is enabled, archive transcripts by client, project, and session.\n- Keep raw transcripts in both this repository's `Memory/06_transcripts/raw/` mirror and the user-level MemoryTree archive.\n- Keep this repository mirror limited to transcripts that belong to the current project. Archive unrelated projects in the global MemoryTree archive only.\n- Generate cleaned transcript indexes with deterministic code, not model-generated rewriting.\n- Raw transcript upload permission for this repository: not set. Ask the user before the first raw transcript commit or push, then record the answer here.\n- If raw transcript uploads are not approved, keep `Memory/06_transcripts/raw/**` unstaged and commit only cleaned transcript indexes or manifests for this repository.\n\n## Git Rules\n- Obey this repository's branch, PR, CI, review, and release rules.\n- Auto-commit and push only MemoryTree-owned changes (`Memory/**` and this file when it is managed by MemoryTree), excluding `Memory/06_transcripts/raw/**` until raw transcript uploads are approved for this repository.\n- Use a MemoryTree-scoped commit title. Prefer `memorytree(<scope>): <subject>`, or the repository-required equivalent such as `docs(memorytree): <subject>`.\n- Use a dedicated branch and PR for MemoryTree-only changes. Enable auto-merge only when repository rules permit it.\n- If a diff includes product code, shared policy files, cross-project transcript files, or unclear ownership, stop and ask the user before staging or pushing.\n- When `auto_push` is enabled, the heartbeat process pushes automatically after committing. If no remote is configured or a push fails, an alert is written to `~/.memorytree/alerts.json`.\n\n## Heartbeat Rules\n- Transcript discovery, import, cleaning, and push are handled by the background heartbeat process. The model does not execute these operations.\n- The model only writes chat log summaries and updates goals and todos during interactive sessions.\n- If `~/.memorytree/alerts.json` contains pending notifications, display them at the start of the session.\n- If `memorytree-daemon` is available but not registered on this machine, ask the user for their preferred settings and offer to run `memorytree-daemon install`.\n- When the user asks to see their most recent conversation, trigger an on-demand sync for the current project, locate the latest session across all clients (Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI), and generate a continuation summary.\n- All interactive prompts must use plain-text questions. Do not rely on client-specific UI components.\n",
  "truncation_policy": {
    "mode": "tokens",
    "limit": 10000
  }
}
